product_title: Philips Norelco Electric Razor Shaver, Model 6705X
product_description: Norelco's Advantage shaving lotion dispensing Razor Rechargeable cordless shavers used to be as convenient as it got. With the Advantage shaver, Norelco adds one more perk--shaving lotion automatically dispensed while you shave. Designed for use at the sink or in the shower, the Advantage uses slim cartridges of Nivea shaving lotion or gel, squeezing out a portion when you depress a simple button. Loading the shaver is easy--the lotion cartridges just slide into position under the back hatch. Plus, thanks to its structure, the shaver can simply be rinsed clean under the faucet. Backing up the innovative shaving lotion feature are the company’s patented Lift and Cut technology and self-sharpening blades for a consistently smooth face. The shaving heads float individually and the entire surface flexes for ideal contouring. A charge of 8 hours delivers 40 minutes of shaving time, and automatic worldwide voltage makes the unit a good traveler. The Advantage comes with a charging stand, a charging indicator light, six samples of lotion, and Norelco’s satisfaction-guarantee. --Emily Bedard

review_text: Having read the glowing reviews from others I was anxious to receive this shaver. When it finally arrived I made sure to charge it up (takes a long time initially 6-8 hrs.) then finally tried it on a 2 day stubble. Well, I wasn't impressed with the shave, it was irritating, uncomfortable, and the gel dispensing gadget was awkward to use. I decided to give this unit the benefit of the doubt because it does state to give it at least 3 weeks for your skin to grow accustom to shaving by this method. Well, here I am 3 weeks later and I'm still not impressed with the shave. I particularly get skin iritation along my neck (burns quite a bit) and it's hard to taper shave near side burns. I've also tried different methods of shaving from: in the shower, over the sink, pre-wash and lubricate with skin lubrication lotion, and just flat out dry shave (very uncomfortable!). Another minus is the charge does not last very long, the shaver peters out after about 2 shaves of about 5-8 minutes (maybe I have a faulty battery?..) I end up having to charge it often. I now decided to go back to using a Braun shaver, which I should have purchased in the first place! My previous one was very good, but i decided to give Norleco a chance...oh well, I guess I'll just have to give it to my nephew - he thinks it looks cool, and he just started shaving! Pros: Ummm...it looks cool Cons: -Terrible shave -weak charge -lift and cut system is not effective -very irritating along neck area -takes long to fully charge -lubricating feature very awkward to use and can get expensive -cleaning is tedious In my opinion go with a foil system instead like a Braun, Panasonic, or even Remington. This system is much more effective and although primarily expensive, it will more than make up for the price in a closer shave and not having to buy lubricating lotion, shaving cream and razor blades.

review_text: The Norelco 6705x is the best norelco I've had yet! I have been a Norelco man for many years and they have always performed well. This model though blows the other electric razors away! The wet/dry feature is great but with the lotion feature this is the bomb in the shower or not in the shower. I used to use my old norelco only when it wasn't hot or humid out, due to the usual razor burn and irratation you get with elcetric razors. Now with this norelco I never have this problem and I can shave with it everyday or even twice to get rid or that 5 o'clock shadow if I'm going out later. If you are looking to buy a wet/dry elecrtic razor THIS IS THE ONE! you won't be disappointed and your skin will love you for it. Try it you'll be glad you did!

review_summary: The best shave with an electric
review_text: To be honest I was a bit skeptical about how effective this razor would be. Most electrics don't get anywhere near as close as a razor, and they usually tear up your face if you haven't shaved in over a day. Yet, I was very interested in this product and really wanted to give it a try to see how effective it was. Now that I have purchased this product and used it, I can honestly say that it shaves very closely, very smoothly, and is very comfortable. The Nivea lotion is comforting and makes the blades glide over your face. Moreover, the lotion smells very nice so it's very pleasant and leaves your face feeling very smooth. Although this product will not shave as close as a razor it still gets very close and I believe will be appreciated by most users. This is one product I would definitely recommend to anyone who is curious.

review_text: I find it interesting that all the reviews up to this point say how this razor is good for sensitive skin. This razor ripped up my neck and throat every time I used it. I don't consider myself to have sensitive skin so this was a suprise to me. In my life I've used every kind of blade and electric razor out there and I've never had this problem. The instructions say to use the razor for 30 days so your skin can get used to it. I used this razor for six months with no improvement. I finally threw it in the garbage out of frustration. I gave it two stars because on my face it worked ok (not great) and I did like to be able to use it in the shower. My next electric will be a Braun.

review_text: This razor is perefect, because it shaves well and is good for sensitive skin since it can be used with shaving lotions. Even if you run out of the lotion packets that go in the razor, you can still use other lotions as you would with a manual razor. Since it is wet/dry you can save time by shaving in the shower too. I have tried several razors and this one is the best for sensitive skin, I shave my head with it too and it hardly even irritates my skin then either. Of course, your skin may be different than mine. I bought one four years ago and it still works fine, so the quality is certainly solid. I can't say how it compares to other models however. I can't imagine anything that could be much better.

review_summary: This just did not work for me
review_text: Every face is different and I tried this Norelco both wet and dry but it did not give me a close shave at all. Admitedly I have a tough beard and sensitive skin so between the two I had a lot of razor burn and more stuble than reasonable. I ended up buying the Panasonic LT-41 and for my face it is wonderful. ALmost no burn and the closet shave I've ever had with an electric shaver - darn near as good as a top of the line blade. If the Norelco works for your face shape and beard then great. I would not recommend it without a 3-week test drive as I don't think it's all that great of shaver. The gel is expensive too and it didn't deliver for me.

review_text: First off let me start off by saying that like most 17 year old males, I have very sensitive skin. Before buying the Norelco Advantage, I could not find a simple solution to getting a nice quick shave without all the hassle that comes along with it. I did not really have a problem at the time, with the length of time that shaving took, but rather, the razor-burn afterwards. I went through about 10-12 different types of creams, and 6-7 different razors, trying to find the right combination. It wasn't until a good friend of mine recommended this, that I decided to try an electric razor. The Norelco definately lived up to it's reputation, as one of the best electric razors out there. Two things that stuck out about it was that you could get a good clean shave in hardly any time at all, and in my case, the gel worked wonders on my previous razor burn. Now, there are however a few things that could have been improved on. None of these however seriously demote the quality of this razor. The first thing that I noticed is that it is not good with multiple day stubble. If I go for a few days without shaving, I end up having to switch to the beard trimmer, and then back again to the regular blade, in order to get a good shave. This can get quite tedious and annoying in a hurry. Another thing that I noticed is that the blades tend to gunk up quite easily making cleaning almost a weekly thing. The last thing is that unless at full charge, the blades tend miss some of the longer hairs. All around this is a great product for those of you out there who are looking for a nice quick close shave. Dollar for dollar this is one of the better products that I have bought, but I look foward to seeing an upgrade on this Electric.

review_text: I've been using an older micro-action Norelco Electric 3 head shaver for the last 5 years. It has been good to me; I spent several years in Europe with it and another few in the States, and I've loved it. I also use the Mach 3 on occasion, when I needed a very close shave. I just bought the 6735XB and am immensely impressed by the close comfortable shave, even on the very first use. I now get the closeness of a Mach 3 shave every morning without the inevitable nicks and cuts. I couldn't be more pleased. Thank you Norelco! A highly recommended buy if you have sensitive skin like mine, and where your 5 o'clock shadow shows up around 3:30.

review_text: I'll rate this 4 stars because nothing is perfect. I have tried various electric razors and generally I am left unsatisfied. Then about a year ago I came across the Norelco 6735 Advantage razor and I am happy to report that I have found the closest thing to a perfect electric razor. The Norelco does very well with daily shaves but doesn't do well against multiple day growth. If I go more than a day without shaving, I'll use a blade to get the close shave. I don't know anything about the mirror since that was not available when I made my original purchase but the razor itself is very good. After 1 year's use, I am still using the same blades that originally came with the razor and it is still shaving as close as when I purchased it. The gels are good though I feel they are somewhat expensive. I will be purchasing 3 more of these razors for my 3 sons this Christmas and believe me, if I wasn't satisified with this razor, that wouldn't be happening.

review_summary: Great Shaving System...but it's no Mach III
review_text: The Norelco 6735XB Advantage Rechargeable Cordless Wet / Dry Shaving System was in my GoldBox, so it was REAL hard to pass up. I did not have real high hopes for the razor because of the Mach III. I have to admit, it is a great razor for everyday shaving. You can use it in the shower and the mirror that comes with it is awesome! You just stick it on the shower wall and your set. The "goo" that comes out does a good job for moving the razor around. You get a close shave, but it's not as close as a blade. Also you don't want to use this thing if you have not shaved for more than two days. It's worth the money and it's great to keep in the shower. My best suggestion is to use it only in the shower. If you have time and money, use the Mach III. You will get a closer, more comfortable shave. I think it is a good complement to the Mach III.

review_text: WOW, I am speechless. But since that is not a good thing when writing a review, I will try to be verbose instead. I have very sensitive skin and because of this, shaving has always been a real chore. Even with the best manual razors from Gillette, the Mach 3 or even the Schick Protector and FX (both tripled bladed also), I could never achieve a close confortable shave. A couple of years ago I decided to give up the blade and try an electric razor. I did all my research and at that time, at least via Consumers Guides, EPINIONS, and other web sites the top of the line Panasonic got top reviews. So I bought one. Boy what a mistake that was for me. It never gave me a close shave and after about 18 months, of use, I had to repace the blade and foil which was about 50% of the cost and this lead me to my new NORELCO Advantage. Wow, What a difference! The instructions stated it would take 3 weeks for the hair on my face to get trained to the Norelco method, but not in my case. My first shave was PERFECT...Even those hard to reach places; like under your lips or below the adam's apple came out hairless. I could never achieve results like this with the other razors, blade or electric. And although some might think that having the built in preshave is a gimmick, I like it, it is one less thing to pack when you are traveling, and its there in a pinch, without loosing your shaving momentum. And since I never plan on growing a beard or mustache, the multi beard controls of the other Norelcos did not appeal to me. So guys, if you have any fathers day money left over, I highly suggest giving your face a break and trying one.

review_summary: Caladryl Clear is not supposed to Calamine Lotion (The 'Pink Stuff')
review_text: There are three different products on the market: 1. Calamine Lotion (The 'Pink Stuff'): Contains Zinc Oxide and 0.5% ferric oxide. It does not contain the anti-itch ingredient Pramoxine. 2. Caladryl Lotion (also pink): Contains Calamine with Pramoxine for anti-itch. It contains both Calamine and Pramoxine. 3. Caladryl Clear Lotion: Contains Pramoxine as an anti-itch. It does not contain Calamine. So, those expecting Caladryl Clear to act as Calamine or Caladryl didn't read the active ingredient labels of the three products.

review_text: I really enjoyed this lotion while I was in the tanning bed- it makes me feel HOT and I really can feel myself tanning. But... I hate the feeling afterwards. I itch, hot-cold, tingly, but this I guess is true with all tingle lotions. I only recommend it to experienced tanners because it can come as a shock to newbies. Also I apply mine with gloves because it stains your hands big time. It took me days to get the orange from between my fingers- it looked like I used a self tanner. All in all- not bad, but I won't be repurchasing.

review_text: This is by far the best tingle bronzing lotion I have ever used. I've tried most all the name brands including Swedish Beauty, Designer Skin, Supre, California Tan. I like this one because it has a hint of self tanner so it makes your tan last longer. It does have a very high tingle factor so if you're a beginner, I would not recommend this product and if you don't like a burning sensation to your skin, then you won't like it either. It has skin firming agents too which keeps your skin from getting a leather look. If you have arthritis and fibro, then this works great when laying in a tanning bed. I lay the least amount of time possible to still get some color and Vitamin D without going overboard. I don't lay over 10 minutes at a time 2 times a week and in summer months only twice a month. Keep away from your face and neck.

review_text: I have been using this product for around a year now. I had problems with proactiv drying my skin out, but not with this product. I tend to have sensitive skin and react badly to some products. However, after using this one for a while I really really like it. Whenever I've used another scrub or face wash, my skin begins to break out again. It feels great and I really like that it is just one simple step. It also smells clean and fresh. I still occasionally get a pimple or two, but for the most part this product keeps my skin fresh and clean! However, it can be bought for cheaper at Wal-Mart or drug stores.

review_summary: What about the stress caused by break outs?
review_text: I don't necessarily know if my acne is stress related but I figured it couldn't hurt to try Neutrogena's new Stress Control acne face wash as I've tried at least a dozen other products out there. Containing cucumber and green tea, both of which are ingredients people frequently use for facial treatments, it seemed like a good product. Plus, the light green colour reminded me of spa treatments and the soft cucumber scent was refreshing. Unfortunately, I really found this product to be average at best. While I didn't have any major break outs while using this product, I found that my type of acne seemed to change from normal pimples to the tiny, painful whiteheads and even some blemishes that seemed to ever refuse to actually surface. Whatever the "Microclear" technology is which is supposed to be in this product, it is too small for me to see it. And while the package claims that it will reduce stress and strain on your face, I wasn't sold. This didn't help to battle and my skin seemed to become super sensitive and red when I went home. Granted, the weather was colder and dryer but I was definitely seeing more of a reaction than I would expect from a 'soothing' facial wash. On the other hand, the scent was really soothing even if it only lasted the duration of my shower. I think that my skin felt refreshed after washing but perhaps it was mostly in my mind and due to the scent. I found Neutrogena Oil-Free Acne Stress Control Power-Clear Scrub to be a little thick and I'm not overly fond of things being in my face wash. The tiny scrubbing beads weren't abrasive but occasionally annoying. One plus I noticed, was that my skin didn't seem to become really oily. I frequently experience oily skin in the morning but this was not a problem with Neutrogena Oil-Free Acne Stress Control Power-Clear Scrub. Over time, I noticed that my skin did become more oily, however. I was also breaking out more often and the skin on my face became uncomfortable so I quickly headed to the store to replace my face wash with something actually effective. Overall, I cannot say anything more about this mediocre product. It smells great but maybe wasn't the product for me. If you experience a lot of acne which you believe to be stress related, I might try it out; otherwise, step in another direction.

review_text: Prior to using this facewash, I was using Acne Free system by University Medical. My skin did slightly improve. There were less acne popping up, as well as a smoother feel to my skin. However, it isn't until I started using the Neutrogena power clear scrub w/microtech did my face undergo a drastic decrease in the redness and number of my acne lesions. What I did was I coupled (literally mixed the two) the Neutrogena wash w/the wash from Acne Free. What I believe the Neutrogena wash does is that it breaks down the oil in the pores alot quicker, allowing the benzoyl peroxide from Acne Free wash to penetrate quicker and deeper to perform its magic. Throw in the salycilic acid from Neutrogena and you have yourself a pretty potent facewash that seems to do a pretty good job. By the way, I am long time acne sufferer and my skin type is oily and very prone to acne. I have tried the entire acne treatment gamut, from Proactive to dermatologist prescribed topicals to Accutane, and have found that my acne has improved the best by using the regiment I had described above. I hope this helps others plagued by acne.

review_summary: Absolutely Fantastic, With A Few Little Problems
review_text: Let me start off by saying that I absolutely adore the Trish McEvoy Moisture Balm, as well as pretty much the entire line. Anyway, this particular balm is remarkably quick; my lips always feel moisturized right after I put it on. After only wearing it for a few days my lips are amazingly soft and no longer have little dark patches where I pulled the dead skin off. It feels a little bit waxy at first, but you don't really notice it after a while. Also, it has a slight scent when you put it on, though you don't really notice it until you put it on yourself, and people tend not to notice unless you're wearing a lot. People also seem to believe that it is a miniature stick of deodorant at times. Overall though, I absolutely adore this lip balm, and I would highly recommend it to anyone who hasn't had any luck with other balms.

review_summary: Light cream, no breakouts, quick results
review_text: I am 35 with olive skin. I still get light acne and my skin does NOT like heavy creams as each attempt has been accompanied with breakouts. I have used various fade-creams in the past, but found them to be too heavy for all over face use, yet at 35- I need all-over moisture! This cream is non-greasy and my skin looked significantly better after only two days of use- more even toned and bright, less dull and splotchy. I have a patch of melasma on my upper lip (due to 15 years of being on the pill) and after a week I have noticed that it has markedly faded and my face seems much more elastic and vibrant. I highly recommend it!

review_summary: Very heavy - Probably better for women younger than 40!
review_text: This is a very heavy cream that leaves your face looking shiny because it is so thick. Not good at all for anyone that has wrinkles!! Probably a great cream for youth as it puts a shine on your face and you can see every flaw in my 46 year old face. So then I thought I'd try it as a night cream. I woke up in the morning with red splotches all over my face. Same thing happened during the day but I thought it was possibly my face soap or something else. Now I know that not only is this cream too heavy for mature women but it also may give you a splotchy look on top of the shine. Trust me, not a good look! A great price but just doesn't work for me! I plan to use it on my hands and feet and see how that goes. Wouldn't recommend for mature women looking for a cream that helps hides wrinkles - if anything it makes them more noticeable than before!

review_text: A little about me- I am late 30's and have pretty good skin just looking for something to delay the aging process. I had purchased the entire obagi line and was starting to use it but hated how it made me so dry and flaky- with spring coming on I was wanting to start tanning and couldn't do that while using Obagi- it was a pretty hefty investment for that skin care line but thought maybe I would put it up until the winter and wanted to try something that would work with me tanning and didn't want to spend 400 on a skin care system without trying it out first and bought this starter set- I am in love! I have used it for 4 days now and can see a huge improvment in my skin- I have lready started ordering the full size products and not sure if I will ever use the obagi or not now- after using the obagi my skin was dry, peeling and I was getting lots of balckheads - after using eminece for just a few days- all blackheads are gone- my skin is softer than it has ever been and has a helthy glow -

review_text: My first purchase of Eminence organic products and I'm so in love! The red rose cleaner smells heavenly and works well if you use a sponge every time. I remove my make up with cleansing cloths first and then use the cleanser. I love the rose and maize exfoliator, it smells amazing and surely deep cleanses your face (unlike the store brand products). So far, I'm happy with the stone crop masque but still waiting to see the full results. I like how I can use this product every day. The apricot moisturizer is for great day time, definitely noticed a difference on my face after wearing it. Nasberry creme works well for overnight. I've done about 3 at-home facials on myself so far and I'm very happy with the results every time! Skin feels clean, soft and overall lovely after. review_text: I've found that this is the only eye cream that doesn't sting or burn skin around my eyes. Other than that, it doesn't really do anything for fine lines, but i don't think it's supposed to, based on the ingredients overview. All it is is just a clear lubricant that you put around your eyes in hopes that it will keep the moisture in. It's also can be somewhat of a primer if you want to use it as such. To apply, you must rub a bit of it between 2 fingers and then pat the area around eyes. I'd give it 3 stars but looking back on all the eye creams I've wasted $$ on over the years, at least this one doesnt hurt - hence 1 extra star.

review_text: Originally got some samples of this from Sephora and fell in love. As a person with sometimes sensitive skin, a lot of creams and face products irritate my skin, doing the opposite of what it's meant to. This one works like no other product I've found (let alone for the price!) for when the very thin skin under my eyes gets dry. I use this product a few times a week. I wouldn't recommend someone use it every day as it may become irritating when overused, but every other day or a few times a week and you're golden. So happy that I found it so affordably on Amazon! Also diminishes puffiness. Bye bye, wrinkes!

review_summary: Loved it! Until it started to hurt!
review_text: I bought the kit for oily skin and have been using all of the products for about 2 weeks. I've been loving this eye cream and have noticed a slight difference in fine lines around my eyes. I would not call this a cream, it's more like a wax. I get a bit on my ring fingers and warm it up between the two and gently pat it around the eye area. I like that I can apply concealer almost immediately. Bad news though, in the last day or two, I've developed REALLY dry patches on my lids and near the outer corners of my eyes. The skin is starting to flake off and I'm bummed! I'm going to stop using this and see if it clears up.

review_summary: kNutek A-RO Balsam Serum works well and gently
review_text: I was introduced to this product at a spa several years ago and gave it a try at home. I have had rosacea for over 10 years, and it is one of the only products that soothes and helps control the symptoms (all you can do since rosacea is chronic). I also like the way it works on acne; it's not harsh like benzoyl peroxide so it takes several days to work but you can see improvement overnight. It seems expensive but it's worth it because you don't need very much. I also use it on body acne as needed. I would highly recommend this product; you don't find many that work well on rosacea, and it's gentle enough for sensitive skin when managing acne.

review_summary: Worked for My Rash Combination of Acne + (either eczema, yeast, ringworm, or allergy hives)
review_text: I bought this product in a store before when I had a rash that could best be described as a combination of acne, eczema, yeast, and allergy hives (possibly ringworm transmitted from the gym, my dog, or from living in a damp basement apartment?), and this product cleared me right up without any need for extra creams. I believe it was the combination of salicylic acid and benzalkonium chloride that did the trick. This product has both, and I have yet to find another product that has both ingredients. I think it's the only one of its kind. I washed just the trouble spot with this soap, and pretty soon, my rash was gone. I highly recommend. Normally, I'd be embarrassed to post this publicly, but hopefully this review helps someone else who finds themselves in a similar skin situation.

review_summary: These are the best wedges that I've used
review_text: I've been using these for years. Every time I try using a different wedge applicator I find them to be too course and painful against my face - but not these. These are so soft and smooth. They are also not very large so I don't feel super wasteful when I use them (I know it's still wasteful, but compared to the larger sizes that other applicator wedges come in these are less wasteful). I use them twice a day - morning and night. I use them to apply lotion to my face after I wash it, and I use them to apply my primer before I put on my foundation (for which I use a brush). I use the same wedge to apply both (apply the lotion using one side and then flip it and apply my primer using the other side). I've gone periods without these before (while moving) and my skin got pimply when I had to apply my lotion and primer with my fingers. My pores didn't like the my oily fingers touching them twice a day. These wedges are a life saver. Without them I'm lost. My skin is happy when I use these c:

review_summary: Box says not safe to use during pregnancy
review_text: As much as I hate to review a product that I wasn't able to try, I wanted to give all the other pregnant moms to be a heads up on this. Even though the product description says use sparingly during pregnancy, the box itself says clearly "do not use during pregnancy". I looked on the manufacturer's site and it didn't say anything about pregnancy, so I called them. They recommended only using during the second trimester and to only put on an area less then an inch wide. Not wanting to risk it, I'm going to return this product and try it again once I'm no longer pregnant. I'm giving it 4 stars based on how much I love this company's youth glow product but deducting a star based on the conflicting info that this manufacturer has on their product.

review_text: I buy and use a great deal of products for skin care made by Philosophy. I love so many of the things they offer. And, because they have a scientific background backing up their company, I also trust that their products will do what they say they will. If you haven't heard of Philosophy, let me tell you now if skin care is important to you, you owe it to yourself to give it a try. The product I am reviewing called "Purity" comes in liquid form as a cream in a pump bottle. That's how I started using it. It is for most purposes a gentle yet powerful facial cleanser and treatment. I didn't realize it came in the form of bar soap until about 6 months ago. I haven't been happy with the bath soaps on the market now, so when I saw this, I decided that I couldn't go wrong. I bought one bar to try as an all over bath soap, and found it to be highly nourishing, pleasant, and cleansing. I did a little research and found out that this bar is exactly the same thing as the cream that comes in a bottle, but in bar form for those who prefer to use one. Since I am not much of a shower person, I always take baths, and take a little time to relax. This soap helps me do that. It comes in a huge bar, and it is very concentrated to last a long time. I love a bath soap that will lather nicely, and this does. After I've used this, I feel clean, refreshed, and have the sense that my skin over my entire body has been given the same great care as my face has. This made sense to me, and consequently, I have kept buying it ever since. It has been given a very appropriate name--Purity. That just sounds good from the very "get-go."

review_text: I can't live without this stuff. It has spoiled me with crazy-long lashes. When I stop using it for a few months my lashes seem to look so..... normal! (The tragedy)! I have somewhat long lashes but they tend to be very sparse and thin. Over 40 they have gotten even more so. When I use Megalash just twice a week they get full and almost falsie-long. I just sweep it across my lashes, not even bothering to get the roots, or apply it to the skin. I can't believe this stuff is $6! I knocked 1 star off because it burns pretty badly if it gets even close to your eye. It also makes my eyes ache similar to a bad reaction if I use it every day. It seems to be just fine when I limit it to 2 or 3 times a week. I suspect that wearing it on days when my eyes water a lot makes it worse. Leaving it on for more than 24 hours causes pain as well. Oh! Almost forgot. I stopped using the Megalash mascara with it. I use Neutrogena Healthy Volume now and it seems to be less irritating.

review_summary: Hands Down Impressed by the Product
review_text: I already have pretty long lashes, (I don't need to put that many coats of mascara nor do I even need to wear fake lashes or anything like that), but I wanted try this product out to see if it would actually make my lashes grow longer. Like probably a lot of consumers, I was skeptical about its claim. And I was surprised to say the least. I actually put this on every night before I went to bed and I also put it on before I put on mascara in the morning for about two months now and I've noticed my lashes are super long now. I no longer wear mascara because whatever mascara I do put on, it doesn't do much of a difference anymore emphasizing my eyes. This product really does work, I'm actually impressed, way to go Wet n'Wild.

review_text: March 30, 2013 I tried the wet and wild eye lash serum and from the start was very skeptical. To my surprise, it was for naught. The serum albeit inexpensive is very good. review_text: I am VERY impressed with this product! I started using it about 10 days ago. In the first couple of days I forgot to use it, so I have only used it for about 6 days in a row. Also, I have only used the serum (not the mascara), and only at night. I apply by swiping the brush across the top of my lashes and along my eyelid as I would apply eyeliner. I wipe the rest on my brow before re-dipping and moving on to the other eye. I'm not too precise, but I do make sure my lashes are saturated. I'll admit that I was not expecting much considering that this is the third lash enhancing product I have used (I previously tried the L'Oreal serum and the Physician's Formula silver eye pen, with no noticable results). But I am really astonished by this wet n' wild serum! My eyelashes are starting to appear longer, and definately thicker. At first I thought maybe it was wishful thinking on my part, but two of my coworkers have commented in the last 2 days on how long my lashes look. One of them actually said "you have a million lashes!". I have naturally sparse, blonde, and stubby lashes so this is pretty amazing. When I take my mascara off, I run my fingers over my lashes and can feel the extra length. They also seem to be stronger (No fallout when washing my face). I am sold on this serum and can't wait to see what kind of results I have after a month!

review_summary: Not too loud for a coral, and love the formula
review_text: These lipsticks are amazing. I was worried, as the name suggests, that this one would be very coral, which tends to skew unflatteringly orange on me. It is indeed coral, but somehow really flattering and not too loud. I feel like there's a confusingly wide definition of what people consider "coral," and this shade is more like a pinky coral than an orangey coral, if that makes any sense. It's actually not all that different from the other shade I bought, Red Velvet, which I classify as a pinky red. The formula is great, too, including for those of us with sensitive skin. Love!

review_text: Thick and creamy, doesn't seem drying. It is deeply pigmented with an orange-red base color, yet it still has a coral hue. This Coraline color pops bright and isn't for the timid or shy. It would look great on fair skin tones and on deep skin tones. Definately not for cool color skin tones, it's best suited for warm tones, although neutral tones could make it work. I tried it as a stain, blotted a little off and then applied a more subtle color over it and it looked pretty. It lasted for hours, as good as my higher end lipsticks do. I'm going to try a few more colors in the Wet-n-Wild. Nice lipstick for the price.

review_text: This is a great product that has improved my skin considerably since I've started using it. In fact, when I stopped using it for a few weeks (I was traveling and did not pack it with me) I realized how much this product does for my skin when I use it. This cream, when used daily, dissolves dead skin cells and keeps my pores clear and unclogged. The skin texture and color are wonderful and other skin products work much better and effectively. If you do have a sensitive skin this may not be the best product for you, since it contains glycolic acid. Also, keep in mind that if combined with other products with glycolic acid, your skin may get a bit stripped and sensitive. I have a normal to oily skin and this cream does wonders for my skin. I've received a number of compliments from dermatologists and cosmetologists on the condition of my skin. One thing to keep in mind when using this cream: it does not get absorbed completely upon the application. Instead, it forms a thin layer, which if you try to rub further into your skin will start rolling off. Think of this cream as a night mask - smooth a thin layer over your face and leave it. In the morning just wash it off and go on with your morning skin care routine. When used regularly and properly, this cream will do wonders for your skin.

review_text: I had just had my 75th birthday and I STILL HAD ACNE! I'd had it from age 13 all the way up to my 75th birthday. As you might guess, I also had a lot of wrinkles, as do most people at age 75. Over the decades I had tried every possible treatment for acne, and the ones that worked best were also the ones that dried out my skin and accentuated the wrinkles. I had ugly red pimples for my junior prom, my graduation not only from high school but also from college, from my wedding until my daughters' weddings. At age 75 I found this wonderful serum. It really does work. Now I have just had my 80th birthday, have almost no blemishes, and my facial wrinkles are much reduced from how they had been. To sum it up: my story is that from 1937 until 1950 I had clear skin; from 1950 until 2012, nonstop zits; and from 2012 until 2017, clear skin, with fewer winkles than most of my friends. I think that it might also work very well for younger women----those in their 50s and 60s!

review_text: I LOVE this moisturizer! My daughter got a sample somewhere and gave it to me. I had never seen or heard of it before. I was amazed when I tried it out. Besides feeling wonderful (I can feel a slight tightening), the scent is so sweet and wonderful! I then went to the FarmHouse site and was impressed with their products and the ingredients, so when my sample of this moisturizer was gone, I took it from my Wish List and put it into my Cart and made the order. Am I pleased! This moisturizer is wonderful. I was also impressed with the seven ounce amount in the small jar. Since it spreads smoothly, very little is needed at a time. This jar will last a very long time. And, even though it comes in a jar, it still fits in my medicine cabinet. Scrumptious! Five stars!

review_text: This is my very favorite body lotion . I love anything honeysuckle when it is a pure fragrance and that is exactly what this is, with a touch of orange . Everyone in my family notices when I use it and compliments me because they love the fragrance so much . I do use it sparingly because it is a little expensive for me, but worth every penny because it gives me such a lift and joy when I wear it. The moisturizing that it does is wonderful, also. I found it first at Dubunne Day Spa that I go to whenever I get a gift certificate . I bought the last three that they had there. They no longer carry it there so I was so happy when I found it on Amazon /Pretty Skin 4 less. The price was about twice as much as what I paid at the day spa, but I just thought, I need to have it one more time because I love it so much , so I splurged. They sent me a 20 percent off coupon for my next order, so I may have to order me one more !

product_title: Annmarie Skin Care - Coconut Body Oil, 100ml
product_description:
Nourish and soften your skin daily with a unique blend of oils infused with nutrient-rich herbs - milk thistle, life everlasting and calendula. This luxurious formula is rich in lauric acid (coconut oil) and finished with the aroma of lavender. Soothes the body and eases the mind.

Key Ingredients:
Extra Virgin Coconut Oil, Milk Thistle Seed, Rooibos

Benefits:
Moisturizes
Nourishes
Softens Skin

Suitable For:
All Skin Types

For Best Results:
Use after shower or bath as an all over body moisturizer, or add a few drops to bath. For the ultimate massage oil, warm between palms before applying to clean skin.

review_text: I've been using this oil (my first bottle) since several months ago. Summer, winter, doesn't matter. I wasn't sure how my skin would react to the oil in different seasons. Well, my skin is really soft, and the texture is much smoother than when I started using the oil. It says it is a body oil, and I've used it that way. Primarily, though, I've been using it on my face and neck with great results. I would have to say that this is the best skin moisturizer that I've ever used. Really. And I love the fact that it contains the highest quality, organic ingredients. I bought the large bottle. It is a bit pricey but worth it. And, it only takes a little bit of oil - just a few drops for the face and neck. I would definitely buy this product again.

review_text: Buy this lotion! I can't remember how I first heard of JustNeem, but I have been using the soaps and lotion for about two months now. My skin is softer and smoother than ever. This lotion is light and absorbs quickly, with no greasy feel. Neem is well known for its amazing healing properties, but if you've ever smelled neem oil on its own...it's horrible! JustNeem manages to incorporate the neem oil with other essential oils so that you get all of the great benefits of neem, but with a great fresh scent. This is a great product, well worth the price.
product_title: JUSTNEEM Lotion Neem Wind Sea, 8 Ounce
product_description_filled: Product: JUSTNEEM Lotion Neem Wind Sea, 8 Ounce. Brand: JustNeem.

review_text: Have had dry cracked feet most of my life. Tried all the "healing" lotions at the drug stores. While they made my skin LOOK better for an hour or two, they never really healed the skin. I started using JustNeem Wind & Sea lotion on my feet after showers and baths and this lotion actually started healing my dry cracked skin after about one week (5 times)of use. review_text: I really like this. I got it instead of a similar product because at the price point, it was cheaper and offered more with the container size. This stuff smells really good and it works well at taking off my makeup. What I do is rub it all over my face first and then I work on my eye makeup. It doesn't look like much but when you wash your hands and get the cream off, you see makeup washing off. Sometimes I take warm water and rub it on my face after to emulsify the cream and it's cool because you see your makeup just melting off. That gets messy so I use a warm cloth to wipe everything off and it gets all of my eye makeup as well. I do wear waterproof eye makeup and it's rare that I have to swab my eye with eye makeup remover again after I wash but it just depends how well I removed my makeup. Your face feels so smooth and clean after without the drying feeling. This is part of my double cleansing routine, as I do wash with a spin brush and water based cleanser afterwards

review_summary: I don't use it as a lipstick
review_text: Under white light its a very dark purple but under blacklight, its a mauve or a pastel, light purple. So when I'm gonna be under UV lights, I use it as a lip, eye and brow liner. When in white light, it appears nearly black and fairly normal, yet under UV, my lips, eyes, and brows illuminate with outlines. I use a toothpick to apply it. It takes a few tries to get it looking right. I want this same color in a pencil!

review_text: This stuff is amazing. I'm 28 so I don't really have a ton of wrinkles but I'm starting to get fine lines! It killed me to spend this much but I had to try it....and I'm so glad I did: I now use this every other night in conjunction with the micro peel and the exfolikate (which is life changly amazing!). Yes- it's expensive...but your skin will never have felt to soft and supple. I feel like I have a glow again. Nothing is a miracle when it comes to face products, but I'm on my second tube of this and still in LOVE.

review_text: It does exist-- a broad spectrum spf acne treating moisturizer that doesn't leave your face shiny-- and THIS IS IT. It's worth every red cent. I will probably still use my mattifying primer on top of this in my t-zone for days I choose to dust on some mineral foundation, but even without anything else, my usual oil slick of a t-zone is not greasy. I wouldn't go so far as to say this makes my face MATTE, but it's much less than dewy all day and all night long. My skin looks young and healthy minus the shine factor, sparkles, or any of the other crap I hate in all of the spf products I've ever tried. I wish I had found this years ago, before I wasted hundreds, perhaps thousands, of dollars looking for something just like this. Shine free spf protection, grease control, and acne treatment/prevention. Why is this the only company that seems capable of getting it right? I use this in conjunction with alcohol free witch hazel toner.

review_summary: Very Gentle, Leaves Your Skin Hydrated
review_text: I purchased this toner because I used to use a skin care regime that included freshener and I missed having that step. I was happy to see that this was made for sensitive skin because my skin is touchy and I didn't want any harsh, drying ingredients. I was also happy to see that Mediderm makes their products with quality ingredients and paraben free. The toner has a light, pleasant natural scent, not strong at all. That's a plus for me, I don't handle strong scents well. I sprinkled some on a cotton pad, I was surprised to see it was a light blue color, I would prefer no color, but that's just my preference. I applied the toner and I was very gentle on my skin. There was absolutely no stinging, burning or any discomfort at all. My skin felt clean, soft and hydrated. I am very pleased with this toner. I received this product at a discount for my honest, unbiased opinion and review.

review_summary: My Wife's Favorite Mediderm Product So Far!
review_text: I purchased this Sensitive Revitalizing Toner by Mediderm Laboratories for my wife who is amassing a collection of skin care products to help her retain her youthful appearance. She's 37 and has the skin of a 20 something year old. She's noticing small changes in her skin as she ages and knows that the solution to the problem is to give her skin what it needs. As she explained it over time the skin becomes more brittle and thin. If you help "feed it" you can prevent and reverse some of those age related changes. This review is based on her experience using this product. Ok. So, my wife is of the opinion that if you find a skin care line of products that is a quality product you should stick to that line as the products are better compatible with those of their own line. She already has and uses some of the other Mediderm skin care products and has had excellent results with them. Adding this product to her collection and skin care routine was one of the best things she did for her skin. My wife is a fair skinned redhead with sensitive skin. Whether she can tolerate certain products is always hit or miss. So the fact that this product is specifically made for sensitive skin was encouraging. My wife said that this was the best product that she has used so far. Why? It improves her skin without irritating it or creating blemishes. How? Well it's simple. This is a toner. What that means is that it's a deep cleaner that has many other benefits that come with it. It removes oil from the skin and deep cleans the pores in the skin. The result of this is reduced or prevented acne breakouts. It also shrinks the appearance of pores and restores the pH balance of the skin after you wash it. It saves your body the work of doing that work. It creates a barrier over your skin which protects it from the harsh effects of the environment. They moisturize by binding water to the skin and even prevent ingrown hairs. The end result is healthy looking clean skin that feels soothed and refreshed. So that's what my wife meant when she said this product was excellent at toning her skin. It decreases the appearance of fine lines which made her already youthful looking skin appear even more youthful. Paraben free (a must for all my wife's skin care products). This is an amazing product. Would make a great stocking stuffer. Bridal shower gift so the bride can look her best on her wedding day. And would be a great component of a spa gift basket. Highly recommended. Affordable pricing (especially when compared to products you buy in the stores). I was provided this product at a discounted price in exchange for an honest unbiased evaluation. My opinions are my own and were in no influenced by the fact that I received this product at a discount. I did not receive compensation for this review.

review_text: I love this! I have been using this in my daily pre-makeup regimen and I love it. First - it smells like chamomile. I don't know if you've ever smelled chamomile but it's just lovely. I actually let it sit longer than usual on my face just so I can appreciate the scent before adding on moisturizers and such. My skin is so soft and I now believe people when they say they can't believe I'm 30. I'm back at school again and felt like an old fart, but using this and seeing the surprise in people's faces when I tell them my age makes me feel so good. I wish I hadn't waited so long to start using something like this. I also never knew that chamomile was responsible for that smell until I saw the ingredients and now I have to see if I can find essential oils or perfume or something with that scent! Also, I turn this upside down twice with a cotton ball firmly at its tip and that's enough to apply to my entire face and neck. I was fortunate to receive this at a discounted price for my honest and unbiased testing and review. My opinion is based solely on my own personal experience with the toner and was not in any way influenced by outside sources.

review_summary: I Actually Like Washing My Face
review_text: I really like this cold cream. I've just started cleansing my face with cold cream and I really like it. I can't imagine going back to other cleansers. It's gentle and without sulfates or parabens, which is important to me. I massage it into my face and neck and then remove with a damp wash cloth. I really like how quickly I can get a good skin cleansing just using cold cream. If I am wearing makeup, I use the cold cream to remove makeup and then do a second massage-in cleansing and remove with the wet washcloth. I have issues with rosacea and have not had any rosacea with this cream. Also, no acne or any kind of skin reaction or sensitivity which I have been dealing with my entire life. I can't say enough good things about this cream except that I wish I had discovered it sooner. I highly recommend.

review_text: This Hermes moisturizing lotion is not the best for skin treatment but I just adore the scent. I sampled the Eau D'orange shampoo in France and decided I could use the same scent in a body lotion. I'm a man and like the way the scent calms down as I wear the lotion. Much softer scent than using cologne. Never gets sticky or tacky. No problem with staining fabrics if you apply sparingly and work into skin. I will buy again.

It was devised as a burst of citrus touches, with orange to the fore, amidst zests and leaves, lemon, mandarin, mint and blackcurrant buds. Its complexity is revealed in a unique vapor composed of oak moss and patchouli.

review_text: I purchased this before for oil pulling and even referred many people to the item because it worked so well. I'm late rating the item but when I purchased this order for me and a co-worker I found it had a strange sentiment much like mutters in ACV and had lost it's familiar sesame oil scent. There was something cheap, cheesy, and unfamiliar about this last order and for safety purposes I simply trashed my order. I'm very sorry because I thought I had landed here with confidence since I had happily and satisfactory purchased this oil several times in the past. Very disappointing to say the least.
product_title: Sesame Seed Oil From RAW Seed Unrefined Cold Pressed 12 Oz
product_description:
Common Uses: Sesame Organic Carrier Oil is popular in cosmetics as a natural moisturizer. Similarly, it is a good choice for massage therapists and aromatherapists alike.
Consistency: Sesame Organic Carrier Oil has lighter consistency than of typical Carrier Oils.
Absorption: Absorbs into skin at average speed, and leaves slight oily feeling on the skin.

review_summary: This oil and this company meet all my requirements
review_text: I was searching for the purest, most unrefined, most versatile and cost-effective carrier oil when I found this sesame seed oil by Dr. Adorable. What makes sesame seed oil so versatile is its low viscosity and odorless properties. As a thin oil it absorbs quickly and works well in essential oil roller blend. It works well with aromatherapy as it is scent-less and therefore mixes with any EO (unlike almond oil, for example, which is so sweet it overpowers and hampers the scents of some oils). The cold-pressing technique is one of a few "processing" methods that retains as much of the oil's nutrients as possible. After looking at Dr. Adorable's website it's obvious this company is dedicated to high-quality, natural beauty products. As a sesame seed oil in particular, and as an oil from this company in general, this product meets everything on my checklist. I plan on buying the two-pack when my bottle runs out.

review_text: I am a licensed esthetician and a baby boomer who cares about her skin. This has no fragrance and the texture of the cream is divine. It sinks into your skin instantly w/o any sticky feeling leftover. On rare occasions when my skin has sensitivity, no other night cream will do, in fact they tend to make it worse, even when they might pass otherwise. There are other good and decent products out there which I tend to try out bc skincare and skincare products are my passion...but this cream is the one I need especially at times during breakouts and sensitivity; so I have learned not to 'mess around' with other products too much. I always come back to this one to depend on so I try to keep this one on hand ALL the time. As usual, the prices on Amazon fluctuate widely at times. If you can get this at a fair price, grab it.

product_title: PrecisionMD Vivatia Active Repair Complex 0.5% Retinol (1.7 oz)
product_description: Vivatia Active Repair Complex 0.5% Retinol is a unique retinol treatment that combines stabilized retinol with a proprietary mix of anti aging ingredients that accelerate and improve results. Proprietary foam enables to combine ingredients like retinol, peptides, niacinamide and antioxidants and keep them pure and effective. It is formulated to deliver highly effective ingredients gently to the skin to maximize results and minimize irritation. The formula has been clinically proven to deliver visible results that match prescription tretinoin. Vivatia Active Repair Complex diminishes the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, smoothes and softens skin for a more supple texture. It improves skin radiance for a more luminous complexion and evens skin tone for a more consistent complexion.Directions For UseApply in PM after cleansing and after eye cream if you choose to use one. If you are not currently using retinol, begin slowly to build tolerance. To start, use Active Repair Complex every other night for 1 week then increase frequency to every night. Do not use if pregnant or nursing.

review_text: I purchased this because my mother's dermatologist recommended it to her. She began using it and loved the results therefore; I went directly to Amazon to see if it was sold here for a better price. Finding it to be similar in price, I purchased and began using it immediately. After one day, I did notice a difference!! I began to get very, very defined wrinkles under my eyes. I looked very tired and chalked it up to that. By the second and third day the under eye wrinkles were producing at a faster rate. I am very, very unhappy with this product. I'm not sure if it is just not right for someone my age (I'm 44) or if there is something wrong with the product I purchased. I look like I've aged 10 years in just three days. I will stop using this immediately. I hope it does work better for others.

review_summary: Product is terrific, applicator is not
review_text: I like using Lotil cream because it does what it claims to do, that is, soften your skin, effortlessly and easily. The smell is pleasant - not perfumy nor artificial. Clean. Yes, I would describe the smell as "clean". I use the cream on my feet, then put my socks on. Since it absorbs into my skin, my feet are not slippery when I next get into the shower, which is nice. (Some products leave your feet so slippery when you step into the shower it is like walking on ice!) I also apply the cream on my hands at night before pulling on cotton gloves. In the morning you hands are so soft! The only reason I awarded four stars instead of five is the applicator - it does not dispense enough of the product, but because the cream is so thick, it also does not always come out in a timely fashion. Of course, one could always transfer this to a different applicator. This really is a great product and I think you will be pleased using it.

review_text: When I first used this, my feet turned an almost orange-ish color. I was disappointed after reading many reviews about how this tanner doesn't turn your skin orange. However, I have very pale skin and I didn't apply regular lotion to my feet beforehand (pro tip: apply lotion to your feet and other rough areas before using this). Your skin doesn't immediately look darker after application btw, it takes a couple of hours. When I took a shower the next day, the color faded and blended a little, which I wanted, and looked much better. I'm on my fourth application in 2 weeks and the color is finally stable and definitely not an almost orange-ish shade; I think it takes a few applications to get it right. I'm not a fan of the smell, but it's bearable. Overall, I'm happy with how this works! Just wish it wasn't so expensive for only 300ml.

review_text: I would recommend this product to anyone who is concerned about the quality of their appearance. The face (of women especially) is used to judge whether a person is outgoing, powerful, intelligent and/or healthy. I have used many moisturizers, including some priced at $24 for 3.0 oz (when I was in my teens and early 20s), $52 for 2.5 oz. (in my mid-20s) or as much as $85 for 1.0 oz (in my early 30s). Since I have started using CT Organics' product, I am satisfied with the texture and color of my skin. I have had a problem with Rosacea in the past, and this product is soothing and gentile enough to give me an even skin tone. This day face cream does not irritate my skin. I feel a glow when I wear this product. I have contrasted it with my old moisturizer, which now seems of lower value compared with the superior product provided by CT Organics. I recently traveled to a wedding and took my travel-sized version of this product. The cosmetologist who made up my face for the wedding said my skin was a perfect canvas, even though I had taken a red-eye flight to arrive in time. I must also mention the fragrance of this cream, which I enjoy. It is lightly floral and earthy; I would say the smell is appropriate for men or women. I also like the pump, which delivers a measured amount of cream without contaminating the remaining product (unlike some other products that come in a pot). Overall I love this product!

review_text: I've used this moisturizer for over 5 months, and am extremely happy with the results. It has a very pleasant light scent. It's really great for dry hands, as well as face and body. What's really nice about this cream is that it moisturizers very well, but it's not at all oily, which is a problem I find with other creams. It moisturizers so well that you don't need to use a ton to get your hands soft, so it last for quite a while. Putting it on once a day works really well for me, and that's all I need to keep my skin soft. I would recommend anyone looking for moisturizer to use this one, you can tell that it is great quality!

review_summary: Almost didn't try this & that would have been a big mistake!
review_text: Kind of long but definitely worth reading before you buy! I almost didn't use this cleanser & that would have been a huge mistake. I received it in a trial size with Vertere's Dramatic Transformation Cream & was so focused on the cream I didn't even try the cleanser. I figured it was just a cleanser & kept using my Glycolic cleanser that I loved. About 2 months after I started to use the cream I actually took the time to read the info about this cleanser. It was a definite smack myself in the forehead moment. It's far from "just a cleanser" as I originally thought. It's a cleanser & serum in 1! This brand is based on having minimal steps & not needing to layer products so I should have known the cleanser had something special to it. As you cleanse your skin soaks up the lactic acid & other great ingredients. My skin had already shown significant changes from using Vertere's Cream...now after using the cleanser too I've seen even more. I use this cleanser in the morning & another at night - just from 1x per day I've definitely noticed improvement. My acne scarring is starting to lighten, I've had less breakouts, & in some areas my pores seem a little smaller. This cleanser is different then any other cleanser I've ever used - it has the consistency of a serum, it doesn't foam up, create suds, or honestly even seem like a cleanser when you are using it. But then you rinse your face w/hot water & find your skin is so soft, it doesn't feel dry like with almost every other cleanser, & if you use their whole line all that's left is to put a tiny amount of their Dramatic Transformation Cream. No toner, no serum, no 5 layers of products...just this cleanser & the cream (& they just came out with an eye cream too!) & I just have to point out that I have been searching for "the" products for years now. I've tried several skincare lines, but found nothing that made enough of a difference that it was worth buying again. I always have just finished using it then ordered something different (unless it was horrible & then of course I tossed it). Well...I have finally found "the ones"! Vertere is amazing. (After all the products I've tried I thought I would always be settling or I'd be using 10 products to get the results I wanted. I never thought I'd call any skincare product amazing.) I can honestly say this is it, I've found it!! No more searching. Both the cleanser & the cream will stay a part of my routine - really they will be my routine since the whole principal is not to have to layer or use several products! Vertere products are a little pricey but sooo worth it. I hope this helps you decide. I can honestly say I have never written a review for a skincare product before - wasn't worth my time but Vertere's products are that good - it feels wrong not to tell everyone just how good.

review_text: I'm going on 44 and let me tell you - the cleanser you use makes a HUGE difference. Those who say it doesn't matter what cleanser you use because you simply wash it off your face have NO idea what they're talking about. There's a HUGE difference in my skin when I use a cleanser with AHA's compared to a plain jane cleanser without it. In the past I've used Murad's Clarifying Cleanser which left my skin so tight and dry afterwards it hurt to smile. I've also used MD Formulations Facial Cleanser and it just didn't make my skin feel clean. This Refining Treatment Cleanser is perfect - it has 3.2% lactic acid so it helps keep my breakouts under control and it also keeps the moisture balance in my skin so that I don't get tight and dry and it actually makes my skin look firmer and evens my skin tone. And my skin feels clean without feeling stripped. My skin is so soft after using this. It's really remarkable that this cleanser can do all these things!

Many cleansers designed for mature skins are often too rich for oilier and combination skins - especially those still experiencing breakouts. Refining Treatment Cleanser is an exceptional composition that strikes that elusive balance. Skin is left firm and soft with lines visibly diminished while improving the appearance of blemishes. Skin appears airbrushed. True to our multitasking ethos, Refining Treatment Cleanser also removes non-waterproof eye makeup. Use morning and evening to cleanse the skin without stripping vital moisture. Massage four pumps of cleanser onto damp skin in circular motions. To remove light, non-waterproof eye makeup, massage cleanser over closed eyes for ten seconds. Rinse face with tepid water; pat dry.

review_summary: Great soap for helping with acne issues.
review_text: I bought this soap because my fianc struggles with acne literally all over his body. He doesn't want to go to a dermatologist yet to get something stronger and most likely oral, so I decided to try this soap to help. I have always heard that charcoal is great for helping with skin and acne issues. The soap smells great! I could literally smell it through the box; I thought I could smell the soap because it had melted during shipping but it was in perfect condition. Opened the box and the soap fits easily in the palm of my hand, which makes it easy to lather. The soap also foamed up nicely and my fianc said it left his skin feeling soft and clean. I would recommend if you purchase this soap to, after each use, place it on a slated soap dish away from any contact with water in order to lengthen the life of the soap. Overall a great soap and hopefully it helps my fianc with his acne issues.

review_text: Initially I was referred to "black soap" to clear up acne, minimize the oils on my skin and give me that squeaky- no residue feeling. I immediately came to amazon to find this "black soap". As I clicked around I realized it isn't JUST "black soap" but, this "black soap" is supposed to be this amazing charcoal based fix all in a square. I read the reviews, I sorted through the questions, and I even read the product description. Fortunately Amazon shipped this item pretty quickly. I truly anticipated its arrival. The day it came I just had to crack the box open. The fragrance is lovely. It truly is. I had to check out the packaging, and read the description along with the ingredients. While reading, I did notice that the description states the soap incorporates lavender and tea tree, where as the ingredient list would speak otherwise. The ingredient list on the box is full of oils. Unfortunately for me, its too oily. Almost every ingredient is an oil. Had I known, I wouldn't have made the purchase. I was reluctant to make the purchase because of the price ($10 for a bar of soap....really?), I was reassured by the reviews, and now I regretting the high standards I had placed on the item. Because of the high standards I placed on the item, I was really disappointed. I suppose I envisioned something completely different based on what I read. Thats my fault, not the items. Don't get me wrong, it smells lovely, and suds nicely, but I just cannot use this on my face. I will continue use and hopefully re-evaluate my review.

product_title: NORLANYA Handheld Anti-aging Dot Matrix RF Thermal Skin Lift Wrinkle Removal Device (2017) Rechargeable by USB Cord or Charging Dock
product_description:
It is new model RF radio frequency thermal therapy device - A popular solution of aging, wrinkles, fine lines and sagging skin.

Functions:
For Eyes - Fine lines, wrinkles removal and smooth our brow line; treat on the upper and lower eyelids and make eyes look youthful and charming.
For Face - Treatment for loose jowls, sagging skin. It can smooth fine lines, wrinkles, tighten skin, rejuvenate skin and remodel collagen for overall skin. It is also helpful for pigmentation reduction and scar improvement.
For Body - Treatment for sagging skin and unwanted bulges and dimples.

Bullet Points:
1) Non-invasive, no pain, no skin damage.
2) 18 big matrix dots to conduct RF energy - comfortable treatment with effective results.
3) Inputs 45-60C to dermal skin - effectively boost collagen and stimulate dermis.
4) 4 Red lights indicate when system is actually working.
5) 6 invisible infrared light improves lifting results.
6) Never need to replace treatment head, no consumables.
7) Low, Medium and High energy level are optional for different skin types, suitable for both sensitive and non-sensitive users..
8) Works on both face and body with big treatment size: 5.5cm2 (0.85 sq.in) - Fast therma treatment.
9) It can work 45-90 minutes after fully charged.
10) It takes 3-4 hours for a full charge.
11) Charged by USB cord or adaptor (with charging dock) - Easy to carry around, able to get charged by computer.
12) Compact, Lightweight and gentle.
13) Comfortable treatment, fast effectiveness and low cost.

Additional Information(Must Read):
1) Use with WATER BASED gel or lotion.(gel/lotion not included)
2) It heats up gradually in 1 minute.
3) Must clean the matrix dots after each use.
4) When in use, move the device over skin all the time to prevent skin burn.

review_text: The first time I used the product, I added too much water and made the mask too "soupy". Next time, I used a little less and got the consistency I was looking for. The mask has an odd odor at first, but I think that is the kelp in it. As you use the mask and it is drying, you can feel it working and tightening. It was easy to rinse off after it dried. Once rinsed off, I used my regular toner and moisturizing product and my face felt extra soft and super clean! I really recommend this product based on my experiences with it!

review_text: Though I'm new to using skincare products, I do know that the more organic the product is, the better it'll be for your skin as nobody wants to expose your skin to harmful chemicals. This moisturizer is 97% natural and 71% organic. It came with a pink see through travel cosmetic bag. Since I'm a male, I have no reason to keep the bag, so I'll end up giving it away to someone I know. The creamy moisturizer has a nice scent to it and the texture is smooth. review_text: This was a lot more luxurious than I was expecting. I was really impressed with this face cream. If you have problems with oily skin than you should only use this at night. In fact, it states that this is intended for nighttime use. This is a powerful moisturizer and feels so luxurious when you apply it. I was so surprised. I have dry skin so my skin just soaked it right up and loved it but for some other people it could be too moisturizing, so that is why you should only use it at night before you go to bed. You will wake up with really moisturized and fresh skin. That is how my skin felt. You do not need to use much at all. Just a little bit because it really is a powerful moisturizer. Any excess I had, I would just apply it to my hands and my hands felt great afterwards. I love that this is packed with antioxidants that my skin needs. My skin loved this. My face felt soft and moisturized. There is no fragrance, which is great! Fragrance is actually bad for your face because of the chemicals they use and no one needs fragrance in a face moisturizer anyways. It smells natural, the way the scent should be. I had no reactions or irritations at all. I honestly love this moisturizer. It feels so luxurious just like a high-end brand or what a spa would give you. This is a high quality and wonderful retinol moisturizing cream that does what it is supposed to do. I am so happy to have found this cream. I highly recommend it for anyone wanting a retinal cream or have dry skin. It does come with a pink plastic bag for traveling too. I was not too impressed with it, though. I just use it for ribbons and barrettes. I received this product through a promotion for my honest and unbiased review. This review is a reflection of my own personal experience with this product.

product_title: ZenXoilz Fractionated Coconut Oil for Aromatherapy, Essential Oil or Massage use - 16oz
product_description:
Fractionated Coconut Oil

Scientists have recently discovered a miraculous coconut oil called "Fractionated Coconut Oil", and now it has been positioned as on elf the best aromatherapy massage oils on the market.

Fractionated coconut oil is processed in a way that removes all the long chain fatty acids, leaving only the healthy medium chain fatty acids. This liquid form of coconut oil has miraculous skin benefits. It has a high concentration of Capric acid and Caprylic acid, which gives it an amazing amount of antioxidant and disinfecting properties. It's an excellent moisturizer and that is known to help with soothing skin rashes, irritations and inflammation. It's also known to help fight acne.

Fractionated coconut oil helps with healing and soothing chapped lips. It has a longer shelf life, is more stable and generally less is used compared to the other types of coconut oil. Unlike normal coconut oil, fractionated coconut oil remains in a liquid state even at low temperatures. Best part is, it will not stain clothes. It does not have a heavy consistency like other oils. Our coconuts are growing in no-man islands in Malaysia and Indonesia and southern China. We hand pick good quality of coconuts to bring you the best oil.

Benefits

Hexane free, Paraben free, Sulfate free and is 100% pure and natural.

Natural and safe moisturizer, softener and safe, non-irritant lubricator.

Leaves skins smooth without being greasy.

Does not aggravate skin problems nor clogs any pores.

Absorbs into the skin while reducing essential oil evaporation.

Orderless and Colorless: Doesn't stain and easily washes out of clothing and sheets.

Can also be used it to create different cream textures.

Aromatherapy: Fractionated coconut oil is used as a carrier oil, since it facilitates the absorption of other oils and herbal extracts.

Cosmetics: Widely used in

review_summary: ... strait as-is in the shower and my skin is super soft afterwards
review_text: I use it strait as-is in the shower and my skin is super soft afterwards. I can see how it would make a very nice carrier oil as it has very little scent and will therefore not offset anything you may pair it with that does already have a scent. I plan to add it to lotion at some point...once I find a lotion I like. I gave it five stars because of it's simple ingredients. Two things I would rather prefer: 1. If it had a pump it might not be as messy (I'm sure I can find a pump and attach one if I really cared enough. But no biggy.) 2. I'd prefer a glass bottle in general. But I left all five stars for this because I can't seem to find fractionated oil in a glass bottle ANYWHERE on amazon and can't fault this particular company in that matter.

review_summary: This serum is one of my new favorites...will be part of my new routine (kind of pricey, though)
review_text: I have only had this product for a few days, so I can only address my initial impressions, which are favorable. I have several serums in my current rotation of skin care products, and there is quite a bit of ingredient overlap, but I was very interested in the red tea extract provided by this serum. In addition to very dry skin, my skin is very sensitive, so I am hoping this serum might help with calming some of the irritation and redness I frequently experience. I've also spent many years of (mostly unprotected) exposure to the sun, and I would definitely be happy with any product that might be able to help repair some of the damage that has accumulated over time. I usually test out new on the backs of my hands and forearms before using them on my face--this is a good test because my hands become rough, dry and chapped during fall and winter. This serum caused no irritation and actually made my hands look and feel smoother almost instantly, even before I applied lotion. I also found that this serum works very well for my face; it is thick and heavy, and just a small amount is needed. A lot of serums are thin and watery, but I prefer one with a heavier consistency--it feels just a bit tacky at first, but goes on easily and smoothly and is absorbed very quickly. It doesn't leave a residue as some serums seem to do, or make my skin feel "crinkly". Instead, my skin looks and feels soft and moisturized; unlike most other serums I use, this one seems quite hydrating on its own, even if I am staying home and skip layering another product over it as I normally would. I started off using this twice a day, but now that I know how much I like it, I will be incorporating it into my normal routine, I intend to use this in rotation with several other serums under a light moisturizer first thing in the morning as I use a retinol serum and a thicker cream at night. I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest review. I am quite happy with my purchase based on my short-term experience and I am hoping there will be more permanent benefits as well. This serum seems pretty expensive at the regular price fo $52.99, but the current sale price of $29.00 might be doable for me--I imagine it will be quite awhile before I need to consider purchasing again, since my current bottle should last for at least four to six months...

review_summary: This stick sunblock was easy to apply
review_text: It works- so I gave it 5 stars. I used this on my LO (9 months) at our community pool a couple of weeks ago and he didn't get sun, so yay! The stick format makes it easier to apply. As a precaution, remember to NEVER use spray-on stuff with a baby (which is why I bought this stick!). And especially not on their little faces-- consequences of inhallation of sunblock is not currently known. This stick sunblock was easy to apply, and easy to maneuver with one hand while holding a squirming baby-- he sure does love the water! I recommend it, and I'll buy another one next year!

product_description:
Anti-wrinkle real snail cream, contains 80% of snail secretion filtrate! - improves skin elasticity 100ml

- Improves damaged skin or skins elasticity and increases softness
- Vitamin A, C and E that protect the skin against external irritants
- Keeps the skin moisturized, long-lasting refreshed, soft and smooth
- Anti-wrinkle effect

- Replenishing dry skin with moisture, vitamins and minerals
