review_summary: sometimes it burns pretty intensely), then I neutralize with baking powder before ...
review_text: I've been using this product about once a week for nine months (which is how long my first bottle lasted), and I'm a fan. I have extremely sensitive skin (it took me years of working with dermatologists to find ONE cleanser and ONE moisturizer that don't break me out). I pour a small amount into a tiny kids medicine cup, apply to skin with small eye shadow brush, leave on as long as possible (sometimes it tingles slightly, sometimes it burns pretty intensely), then I neutralize with baking powder before cleansing my skin as usual. I typically add a heavier moisturizer or aloe vera from my garden to soothe the skin afterward (before baking soda trick, I burnt a patch of skin and it was nasty red for days and peeled). It usually leaves my skin very red for up to a few hours, but once I figured out the baking soda and aloe vera combo it hasn't been a problem at all. The treatment helps even out skin tone, shrink pores, prevent break outs, and reduce wrinkles. It hasn't made a huge difference on my two sun damage spots, but it has kept them from darkening or increasing in size. I just spent a few hours researching more natural products to replace this, but it's been so effective I am ordering a second bottle. I love the glow and compliments in the days after using it.
product_title: 10% Glycolic (AHA-Alpha Hydroxy) Acid Serum for Chemical Peel-Pro Grade
product_description: Alpha Hydroxy Acid (AHA) also known as Glycolic Acid, is the #1 active ingredient for chemical peel, which promotes smoother, younger looking skin by increasing the rate of cell renewal. This serum is fortified by chitosan, beta glucan, botanical extracts, vitamin B's & and; C and moisturizers for soothing and hydrating skin. It is a high concentrate 50% professional grade. But is not burning or irritating to the skin as much as other 50% glycolic acid products since this serum contains many calming and soothing active ingredients like chitosan, beta glucan, ginseng, ginger, aloe vera and green tea extracts. We offer 10%, 30%, 50% and 70% AHA serums in full size (1oz, 30 ml). You may have to dilute high concentrate of the serums of 50% and 70% for general skin rejuvenating. The higher concentrate is not necessarily better than the lower. We like to recommend you to combine our post chemical peel serums and creams for a synergistic effects.

review_summary: A Rich And Potent Chemical Peel Serum!
review_text: This AHA-Alpha Hydroxy Acid Serum is extremely potent. Listed as a peel, I would say it acts more as a rinsing serum because you end up washing it right off after you apply. There really isn't an actual "peel" involved but I assume the reason it is listed as a "peel" is perhaps the benefits are equal to that of a acid peel. (I.E. Removing dead skin without exfoliation!) The instructions are fairly simple, which is marvelous for someone who isn't too attune to this sort of thing. I must stress that you should always do a patch test before you apply it completely to the face. The instructions call for the same thing and I stand 100% with that notion, many people like to skip that and dive straight into these kinds of things without understanding the severity they could have caused if they had sensitive skin. Many people even complain to a company based on this silliness of not testing a product out before they jump into it. So again I say, please test yourself first! Glycolic Acid is the Primary active ingredient for most typical chemical peels. They promote smoother, younger looking skin by increasing the rate of cell renewal. This serum is fortified by chitosan, beta glucan, botanical extracts, vitamin B's & and; C and moisturizers for soothing and hydrating skin. I've seen a noticeably large difference in my skin's overall appearance and smoothness. I've been a big fan of this company's products since I first dabbled into a few things and they still impress me. This product is no different, very impressive and high quality serum with benefits and potency to spare! I love it! 5/5 -The following rating comes from: 1 star- Packaging. (Is the item packaged well?) 1 star- Quality & Materials. (Is the item made well?) 1 star- Functions & Usability. (Does the item work well?) 1 star- Construction & Design. (Does the item look good?) 1 star- Quality Strength & Weight. (Does the item feel good?) -How I review: Based on those 5 mentions above, I take everything into consideration before posting a final review. Also, I use mere common sense when it comes to rating. Is the product worth this amount of stars? Is it not? What would I improve? Is the negative I dislike, if any at all, something that is an error in construction & design or is it something the company couldn't possibly control? And, if all else fails, can I do something to alternate or change the ability of this negative? All this and more is considered before I post. I do a lot of shopping on Amazon, so I decided to take the liberty to post reviews on items I think deserve it. Because I want people who are genuinely interested to know more about the product before they commit. These are my own opinions, I am doing this review merely for the sake of reviewing and expressing my freedom to review. Thank you!

review_summary: Takes a few tries but works well!
review_text: This serum definitely met my expectations. A significantsignificant thing to note though, the directions on the box are different then the directions on Amazon, which made it a tad confusing. The directions on the Amazon are much easier to follow. There are no directions on the bottle itself which is, in my opinion, a downside and could be improved upon. I definitely wish there was a pump on the bottle. That would help to more evenly disperse the serum. The serum smell so wonderful and pleasant. There was a slight tingling sensation upon application but it quickly subsided, and I personally liked the feeling. It didn't make my face red. I followed up with their post chemical peel cream. I had no peeling or dry skin. After using the product for five treatments I have definitely noticed that my pores are much smaller, my skin is clearer and brighter. I still have some fine lines and the light dark spots are still there. I'm going to keep using it, I do belive the spots will eventually fade. Overall I'm glad I tried this product and would recommend it to my friends. I received this product free in exchange for my honest unbiased review

review_text: I've been using this product as a facial moisturizer before bed for a month now and have notice a significant reduction in wrinkles. I also use a serum first nightly and use Tazorac and alpha hydrox once a week but I've been doing that for decades. It does not fade spots or reduce scaly patches ( I use a prescription product for that) but it does make my skin look healthy and younger. It is light so I can use it on the kids' skin when they get too much sun but people with very dry skin may have to use a heavier moisturizer on top. It doesn't contain sunscreen so I use it at night or apply sunscreen afterwards during the day. While the price seems high, it only takes a dime size squirt to cover my entire face. I should try it on my arms and legs but am conscious of how much it costs. I suggest trying it. 2 Month Review - my wrinkles have diminished to the point that my daughter started using this lotion. I still have jowls and old eyes but my skin is looking like I had laser resurfacing (or whatever they call it). 3 Month Review - my jowls are less prominent and I am wearing a lot less foundation because my skin looks so good. I just read research (Santosh Katiyar) on the use of green tea extract to prevent non-melanoma skin cancer. I've already had skin cancer surgery about 8 times and am really hoping this product works to decrease further cases.

review_summary: Safe way to deep clean your skin on your own
review_text: I was always told not to pick at my face and try to pop pimples or remove blackheads and have the scars to show why I probably should have listened to advice, but what I've come to realize is that the problem wasn't removing them from your skin, but rather using your fingers to do it. When my dermatologist began including regular extractions as part of our appointments I caught on to the fact that when done properly and carefully, removing blackheads specially can be a helpful part of a skin care regimen. The key is to use the right tools, and this surgical extraction set is perfect! It comes with a variety of instruments to fit whatever your individual needs are and what area of the face you want to work on. Just make sure you sterelize them properly between uses. I like to put some astrigent on the area after each swipe and try to sterelize the instruments multiple times during use, as getting any kind of an infection or scar on my senstive skin is the opposite of what I want. So far I have seen no adverse effects. I looked up a couple of videos and read a few online tutorials before trying it, and also payed close attention to what I saw my dermatologist doing while I was still paying for regular visits. Now that my skin problem isn't as severe, and the addition of this extractor kit to my arsenal, I feel pretty confident I can take good care of my skin on my own and keep acne at bay. I got this kit at a disocunt in exchange for an honest review, however that did not affect my opinion of the product.

review_summary: Very professional looking tools, with a great variety of tool shapes/surfaces! They work great!
review_text: Wow, these are way nicer than I expected! Love the carry case they come in as well, a nice size for traveling. Pro's *5 tools, but 10 different tool profiles, with VERY different applications from thick steel flats or loops to thinner loops or ellipses! *Nice convenient carry case! *Love the variety and high quality of build and thoughtful grips. Can't think of a shape, that's not here. *They work great! *Arrived 30+ days before the shipping deadline!, WAY ahead of schedule! Con's *Can't really think of one, but hey really stretching, it would be nice if it had a small vial you could put rubbing alcohol or something in to sterilize the tool ends, by dipping them into the vial. Tips- *If you are going to share these you should sterilize with Isopropyl or something after each use. *If you really like being grossed out, check out the blackhead/pimple popping vid's on youtube, they're like a car wreck...you don't want to see them...but you won't be able to look away... or stop from looking at "just one more". Don't say I didn't warn ya'... ;-) We previously had a single tool that we thought was great, so when I was given the chance to evaluate this set at a discount in exchange for my honest review, I jumped on the chance, and I'm so glad I did, I can tell you I wouldn't hesitate to recommend them to family or friends! I hope our experience/input, will be of help to you! Let me know if you have any questions.

review_summary: I love soaps made with natural and organic products
review_text: I do not have time to leave comments about a product. Today, I am willing to do it, because the product has nothing to do with the description. I love soaps made with natural and organic products. And this product smells of chemicals, the smell is so strong that you can not breathe, it smells like a toilet in a gas station. It is a green color and supposedly made with Turmeric and Neem. The turmeric that I drink daily is orange and it is so strong that you can use it to dye with it. Neem is a pale yellow oil with a very peculiar smell. So I can assure you that this soap does not contain any turmeric or neem oil. Do not buy this product with a false description of being natural. I had to throw it away because it left my skin dry and with an unbearable smell.

review_text: In February I took my first trip to India. While there, I broke out in a few hives. Nothing to warrant a trip to the doctor but since it was my first time getting hives I was worried. I purchased this soap at a local shop and began using it, and literally the next day my hives were nearly gone. The redness was gone and the bumps had reduced in size by at least half. I continued using this soap and by the end of the week my hives were gone. Clearly this stuff worked perfectly for me. I used only this soap for the rest of my trip and I'm really looking forward to continuing to use this now that I'm back home.

review_summary: Perfect !! for men to use after shaving and for hydration to dry skin.
review_text: I'm in LOVE with this toner. As a guy with dry skin and who does NOT use washes, cleaners, etc [ I use veggie base soap to wash my face], this toner is AMAZING!!! I use it on my neck as well - shocked to see the dirt that comes out on the cotton pad. Guy, use cotton balls or pads to apply to face. You will waste the product by splashing it onto your face.

review_text: So, I got the black one step gel polish. It did the job in one step, however with out a top coat it created uncured pockets, kind of weird, never seen gel polish do this. review_text: Lacious Lash+ Eyelash Serum is fantastic! There are a number of things I like about it. First, of course, is the fact that it is made of great quality, ALL NATURAL ingredients. I always try to stay away from any skin, hair, etc. products that contain artificial or toxic ingredients. I feel confident that this serum is not harming my eyes in any way. Second, I like how small and compact the container is. It is even smaller than many masara containers that I have used, and it fits very easily anywhere in my handbag, clutch, or even a wallet. Third, I love how tiny and thin the applicator brush is! The instructions say to not get the serum IN the eye, and because the applicator brush is so thin, I'm easily able to control exactly where I apply the serum. It is as easy as applying eyeliner. The fourth thing I like about the serum is that the expiration date is SOOOO far off (2 years)! Lastly, I LOVE how moisturized the roots of my lashes feel after applying the serum! In a way, my whole EYE feels refreshed after application. I was not expecting that at all lol. Since I haven't been using the serum for very long, I can't say I've seen a lot of difference in the length/thickness of my lashes, but that moisturized, refreshed sensation alone is more than enough for me to highly recommend this serum! I will update my review if/when I notice any changes... ***I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest, unbiased review. review_summary: Extra Hydrating Dark Bronze Lotion! Must Have for Tanning Enthusiasts!
review_text: If you are looking for an inexpensive QUALITY tanning lotion, I highly recommend. I have used salon quality brands as well as convenience store tanning lotions for the past 8 years, and this lotion well exceeded my expectation. This lotion makes my skin extremely soft, I haven't used many lotions that feel extra hydrating such as this particular lotion. The smell is refreshing and the bottle is unique compared to most tanning lotion bottle designs. Again, for less than $18, I highly recommend. I was AT LEAST 1-2 shades darker after 1 session in the tanning bed. Great product! I have purchased quite a few times and I have been satisfied each time with my purchase, delivery, packaging and price.

product_title: Aphrodisiac (100% Pure, Undiluted Therapeutic/Best Grade) Premium Aromatherapy Oils by Edens Garden- 5 ml
product_description: DESCRIPTION: You don't have to be a supermodel to feel sexy and desirable. Because, really, who feels sexy when they're starving? Exactly no one. We hope you love your body for all of its curves (or lack of) because your uniqueness is entirely your own and you have every right to be proud. Aphrodisiac can enhance sensual and sexual energy so you can enjoy what the good Lord gave you. Its captivating aroma invigorates the senses while stimulating a steamy magnetism. Have a little fun with it, go a little wild. Aphrodisiac is a provocative blend of Lavender, Sweet Orange, Tangerine, Litsea, Copaiba, Vetiver, Clove Bud, Amyris, Lime, Wild Orange, Ylang Ylang, Patchouli, Geranium, Damiana, Jasmine, and Rose. Made with care from our top quality oils and, as always, Edens Garden essential oils are never diluted or mixed with additives. CONTAINS: Lavender (Lavandula angustifolia), Sweet Orange (Citrus sinensis), Tangerine (Citrus reticulata), Litsea (Litsea cubeba), Copaiba (Copaifera langsdorffii), Vetiver (Vetiveria zizanioides), Clove Bud (Eugenia caryophyllata), Amyris (Amyris balsamifera), Lime (Citrus aurantifolia), Wild Orange (Citrus sinensis), Ylang Ylang (Cananga odorata), Patchouli (Pogostemon cablin), Geranium (Pelargonium graveolens), Damiana (Turnera diffusa), Jasmine (Jasminum officinale var. grandiflorum), Rose (Rosa damascena)BE INSPIRED: Use Aphrodisiac in a massage oil or lotion for some flirty fun. Add 15-20 drops to a 10 ml bottle of Edens Garden carrier oil. Aphrodisiac is also a creative gift for a bride-to-be or fun party favor.

review_summary: Best Benzoyl Peroxide Wash On the Market
review_text: This stuff works when nothing else does. It's better than the "name brand" version and effective on even the most stubborn cystic acne. It doesn't completely dry me out but also doesn't leave my skin feeling unclean / too slick. It works really well on my face and also chest/back areas, especially if combined with a good scrub and a textured back brush. product_title: J.ONE JELLY PACK 50ml+50ml (2 Pack)
product_description: The Jelly Pack is the GR Team's pick for April's Glow Gamechanger, a monthly spotlight of one treatment that will change your skincare game, forever. The Gist: A great multi-tasker that firms skin, hydrates, and 'grips' makeup all in one for a flawless, plump complexion. How it works: Created by Ha Jiwon, popular Korean actress and K-beauty trendsetter, the J.One Jelly Pack is a multi-tasking one step that condenses your morning skincare routine. The unique jelly texture melts into the skin with gentle patting, creating an ultra smooth canvas for flawless makeup application. Fragmented hyaluronic acid deeply hydrates while fullerene acts as an oxygen magnet to brighten complexion. The makeup gripping properties also helps the silky smooth application of any foundation or sunscreen used afterwards. The Jelly Pack is also nicknamed the 'corset mask' for its instantly tensing and firming effect. Dispense a dime size amount onto finger tips and gently sweep onto cleansed skin (approximately 1-2 pumps). After 30 seconds, pat into skin for a complete skincare routine & mask experience in one product. This is a perfect 1-step routine for the morning, but it can also be layered with a night cream before going to sleep.

How it works: Created by Ha Jiwon, popular Korean actress and K-beauty trendsetter, the J.One Jelly Pack is a multi-tasking one step that condenses your morning skincare routine. The unique jelly texture melts into the skin with gentle patting, creating an ultra smooth canvas for flawless makeup application. Fragmented hyaluronic acid deeply hydrates while fullerene acts as an oxygen magnet to brighten complexion. The makeup gripping properties also helps the silky smooth application of any foundation or sunscreen used afterwards. The Jelly Pack is also nicknamed the 'corset mask' for its instantly tensing and firming effect. Dispense a dime size amount onto finger tips and gently sweep onto cleansed skin (approximately 1-2 pumps). After 30 seconds, pat into skin for a complete skincare routine & mask experience in one product. This is a perfect 1-step routine for the morning, but it can also be layered with a night cream before going to sleep.

review_summary: This product almost acts like a priming layer for my face so I like ...
review_text: I've only used this product twice and I usually use it before I put on my makeup. The product is thick and sticky but absorbs into your skin quickly and the stickiness disappears. You immediately see your skin looking fuller and smoother. This product almost acts like a priming layer for my face so I like to wear it when I put on makeup. It is on the bit expensive size you won't be disappointed with the results! It doesn't clog your pores and almost acts like a protective layer on your skin before you apply your makeup on.

review_text: Love these! I wear work boots every day, these helped align my toes to make my boots comfortable again!
product_title: AAATSSox Gel Lined Toes Alignment Socks Moisturize Soften Therapeutic Toe Skin Moisturizing Sock Yoga GYM Massage Five Toe Separator Foot Feet Pain Relief (ToeGelSocks, White - 1 Pair )
product_description:
Antibacterial gel toe socks help align crowded toes, cushioning the balls of the feet and metatarsal areas. Breathable opentoe design is comfortable with most shoes. Antimicrobial treatment fends off harmful and odorcausing bacteria. Great for locking in moisture after applying foot cream. These soft and stretchy Gel-Lined Compression Toe Separating Socks help align overlapping or crowded toes. They also cushion the ball-of-foot and metatarsal areas, and help control bunion, corn or hammertoe pain with gel cushioning. These socks also promote blister prevention and helps lock foot creams in place to better moisturize and nourish skin. Versatile and comfortable socks for front feet and toes, these do way more than just separate toes. If you have diabetes or poor circulation, consult your physician or a healthcare professional before using this product. Sock is designed for bedtime wear and home only and should not be worn with shoes.
Socks Fits U.S. Mens Shoe Size 5 - 9, U.S. Women's Size 6.5 - 10
Note: These socks are not for people with wide foot or thick Toes.

product_title: kleenite Multipurpose Dental Cleanser, 90 cleanings, Fresh mint 9 fl oz
product_description: The Only Multipurpose Dental Cleanser Specially Formulated for... Partials Orthodontic retainers Mouth guards Dentures 90 Cleanings Fast and powerful cleaning action Cleans, freshens & deodorizes Brightens & whitens like new Safe & effective for metal partials, orthodontic retainers, mouth guards & full dentures. 3x more powerful cleaning action. Contains baking soda to clean & freshen. Removes plaque & kills bacteria that cause denture odor. Kleenite works quickly and economically to get your dental appliance cleaner, brighter & whiter. Super active oxygen bubbles clean tough stains while they help fight plaque and odor-causing bacteria. Pour 3/4 capful of Kleenite into a glass or denture bath. Add hot tap water so that the entire appliance is covered. If appliance is heavily stained, mix 1-2 capfuls and soak for several hours or overnight, depending on need. Kleenite may be safely used for regular overnight soaking. For orthodontic appliances or other heat softening self- adjusting appliances, use only lukewarm water. Rinse thoroughly with running water. For best results, brush with solution and rinse again. Use Kleenite every day for a clean, fresh dental appliance. Regent Labs, Inc

product_description: The Only Multipurpose Dental Cleanser Specially Formulated for... Partials Orthodontic retainers Mouth guards Dentures 90 Cleanings Fast and powerful cleaning action Cleans, freshens & deodorizes Brightens & whitens like new Safe & effective for metal partials, orthodontic retainers, mouth guards & full dentures. 3x more powerful cleaning action. Contains baking soda to clean & freshen. Removes plaque & kills bacteria that cause denture odor. Kleenite works quickly and economically to get your dental appliance cleaner, brighter & whiter. Super active oxygen bubbles clean tough stains while they help fight plaque and odor-causing bacteria. Pour 3/4 capful of Kleenite into a glass or denture bath. Add hot tap water so that the entire appliance is covered. If appliance is heavily stained, mix 1-2 capfuls and soak for several hours or overnight, depending on need. Kleenite may be safely used for regular overnight soaking. For orthodontic appliances or other heat softening self- adjusting appliances, use only lukewarm water. Rinse thoroughly with running water. For best results, brush with solution and rinse again. Use Kleenite every day for a clean, fresh dental appliance. Regent Labs, Inc

review_text: Well, it might be a good product, but I'll never know, because it's IMPOSSIBLE to get it out of the ridiculous packaging! As many others have noted (and I wish I had listened), this product is more lotion than serum (it's quite thick), and for some inexplicable reason, it comes inside a small, extremely rigid bottle (read: inflexible, unsqueezable) with only a dropper to remove it. If you've ever tried to suck molasses through a straw, you'll have some idea of how easy (read: not easy at all) this is to do. It's so frustrating that, after trying unsuccessfully to get the product out of its packaging and put it into a more user-friendly container, I just threw it in the trash. I highly recommend you try something else, as if the amount of thought put into the product reflects the amount of thought put into the packaging, you're wasting your money.

review_text: I had my ears pierced at Icing at the local mall. I was told that this solution would have my ears healed in 3 - 4 weeks. I used the solution faithfully three times each day. After 4 weeks, I removed the piercing studs and found it very difficult to place new earrings in the holes. They bled and swelled so badly, that I had to wait two weeks for the holes heal and grow closed and have the ears pierced again. Now I will wait 6 - 8 weeks before removing the new piercing studs. At $70 to pierce each time (cost of solutions and stainless steel studs) I have lost a lot of money because of a product that does not live up to expectations.
product_title: Claire's Accessories Ear Piercing Rapid 3 Week After Care Lotion
product_description_filled: Product: Claire's Accessories Ear Piercing Rapid 3 Week After Care Lotion.

review_text: Claire's upcharged me for this stuff without asking when I had my daughter's ears pierced. After 3 weeks, stupidly, we changed her earrings. Her piercings were NOT healed. I wasn't sure we weren't going to need to repierce them. They bled and scabbed. And she'd been treating them 3 times daily. I didn't realize that the usual wait time is 6 weeks or I would have waited longer. After a traumatic and bloody re-insertion of earrings, we waited another six weeks and then were able to change them without trouble.
product_title: Claire's Accessories Ear Piercing Rapid 3 Week After Care Lotion
product_description_filled: Product: Claire's Accessories Ear Piercing Rapid 3 Week After Care Lotion.

review_summary: Really works, no problem with bleaching clothes
review_text: I obtained the product from Claire's after getting my ears pierced. Love it. I have found that it also helps other cuts and injuries heal faster as well. I get skin burns from an allergic reaction and I found that those healed quicker too. I liked it so much I am trying to find a way to purchase it outside of getting ears pierced. As far as the comments go about it bleaching out clothes. I have not found this to be the case (at least not where I am concerned). I was not careful and let it get on my clothes and so far I have had no issues.
product_title: Claire's Accessories Ear Piercing Rapid 3 Week After Care Lotion
product_description_filled: Product: Claire's Accessories Ear Piercing Rapid 3 Week After Care Lotion.

review_text: The three ingredients in this are water, sodium hypochlorite and potassium iodide. Those are the three basic ingredients of laundry bleach. They sell watered down laundry bleach for $8 bottle. Do not get the rapid healing solution when piercing your ears at Claires. They will try to upsell it when all they are giving you is bleach for your childrens skin. It is reprehensible.

review_text: bought and then read the 'it's bleach' review made me incredibly worried and sceptical. When you look up the ingredients the ingredient that can 'dis-colour fabric' is only 0.179% (sodium hypochlorite) and used to purify water in the solution anti-bacterial properties. Phosphoric acid seems scary but apparently is used in skin products to balance the Ph of the skin back to normal as cleanish get products changes the Ph. Most products have to pass safety tests so scaring people before trying a product is unfair and could lead to them missing out on a possibly great product! I will further review once using it for a couple of days.

review_text: Google the ingredients. This is watered down bleach, people! It smells like bleach. The bottle says it can "discolor clothing". THAT IS BECAUSE IT IS BLEACH!!!!! Saline water is all that is needed to clean a piercing. So scary that this is sold to us as aftercare.

product_title: Grinigh Facial Brush | Multi purpose Electric Facial Cleaner for Removing Blackhead, Exfolicator and Massaging | Scrubber with 9 Latex Face Brush Cosmetic Sponge | exfoliator Kit
product_description:
We at Grinigh love using this fast and effective spin brush because of how smooth your skin looks (bye bye wrinkles) and how bright you look after (death to dark spots! ). Plus, the spinning motion and vibration is wonderful for blood flow and collagen stimulation. Yep, you can say hello to ejuvenated, glowing skin! Great for all skin types because theres softer or stiffer bristled brush heads depending on how sensitive your skin is.

This set includes 7 different brush heads:
Latex sponge: For eye & sensitive skin; gently massage & clean, facilitate blood circulation also reduces fine lines.
Roller massager: For face, hands & neck; rolling bead gently massages the muscle, Improves microcirculation for more radiant skin.
Make-up sponge: For face & sensitive skin; Soft and elastic with uniform pores, easily generates foam with an appropriate skin care product.
Normal brush: To cleanse the dirt and oil on the surface of the skin and remove dead skin cells.
Ultra-fine brush: For sensitive skin; removes deep dirt and oil.
Fine pumice: For hand and nail; removes dead skin and calluses.
Pumice: For hand & foot; removes calluses and rough skin.

* Replace the brushes every 2 to 3 months for good cleaning and exfoliation results.

Specification:
Model No. :FC-0100A
Work model.: rotating
Speed : Slow and Fast
System includes: Exfoliating Renewal Cleanser; 7 Base Facial Cleansing Brushes and 2 replacement brush(Fine pumice and Pumice)

review_summary: There are 2 speeds which is a nice option considering sometimes my face is too sensitive for ...
review_text: I've been using it for about 4 months and I haven't even had to change the batteries (2x AA). There are 2 speeds which is a nice option considering sometimes my face is too sensitive for the faster option. I have not used all of the different brushes that are included, but have tried 3 of them. The one with the longest bristles is the softest and works best for my face. It works great at taking my makeup off and cleaning my face at the same time. I plan to use the roller after I do a face mask to "rejuvenate" and get the blood flowing.

review_text: Best product to use when going through radiation therapy.
product_title: My Girls Skin Care Radiation Burn Care cream 6.8 Oz. (pack of 4 - 1.7 Oz tubes)
product_description: My GirlsTM Skin Care cream is a recommended calendula cream for protecting against radiation-induced dermatitis. Specially formulated unique blend of Hungarian calendula, rosemary, honey, and beeswax plus natural oils; jojoba, olive, coconut, and avocado oil contain no parabens, fragrance or dyes. Radiation oncology clinicians recommend in U.S. hospitals and radiation oncology treatment centers. 85% people included in Cleveland Clinic skin test prefer it to petroleum based gel to protect against radiation-induced dermatitis. 2015 Published by Elsevier Inc.

review_summary: It would be even better if it contained an anti itch ingredient
review_text: This cream was soothing and created a long lasting moisture that got me through 4 or 5 hours per application during my most burnt phase. It would be even better if it contained an anti itch ingredient. I docked 2 points mostly for the fact the price is obviously far higher than the ingredients warrant. Yes, it's less expensive than some, but just when a person is going through radiation for breast cancer and all the bills that come with that , a more reasonable price would be appreciated.

review_summary: I love this soap, the combination of charcoal and the organic oils makes my face feel so soft and clean.
review_text: I have been using this Sran Naturals Organic charcoal soap for approximalty 10 days now, and I love it. My face feels less oily and softer. Charcoal has been used for some time now because of the benefits it has to our skin. activated charcoal boasts beauty benefits for skin by drawing oil, dirt and other harmful substances from clogged pores due to its adsorption powers. Activated charcoal draws bacteria, poisons, chemicals, dirt and other micro-particles to the surface of skin, helping you to achieve a flawless complexion and fight acne. Charcoal is not metabolized, adsorbed or absorbed by the body, but it can be used to treat some poisonous bites and disinfect some wounds. Activated charcoal powder is proven to adsorb thousands of times its own mass in harmful substances, which makes it a popular ingredient in facial masks. Coconut oil is another ingrediant in the wonderful facial soap. Coconut oil, composed mainly of medium chain triglycerides, is very stable and not easily oxidised so it will not cause the free radical damage that refined vegetable oils do. If you largely cut these oils out of your diet and replace them with coconut oil, and other natural fats such as butter, these stable fatty acids will become dominant in your skin and you will not prematurely age like others around you. That is just two of the ingrediants that are in the Srann organic soap. I have not had a major breakout in the 10 days that I have been using it. I would recommend this soap for any grown or teenage person who is having any major skin issues especially on their face. I received this product at a discounted rate for my honest and unbiased review of it, however that does not mean that my opinions are not 100% my own.

review_text: I used to use a standard liquid toner with cotton pads, but after seeing a YouTube beauty blogger raving about this product, I was curious to give it a try. My previous toner left my face feeling really dry after applying it after cleansing my face, but this toner made my face feel so smooth and clean. I've been using this for about a month now. I do feel a slight tightening affect, and I think it did help shrink my pores. I have sensitive, acne-prone, combination skin (thanks, genetics.) and I credit this for helping calm my acne down a lot. Love this toner and other Living Nature products.
product_title: Natural Being Skin Toner with Manuka Honey
product_description_filled: Product: Natural Being Skin Toner with Manuka Honey. Brand: Living Nature.

review_text: First Impression: The packaging is generic and nothing special. It comes in a squeezable tube and it is esy to get the desired amount of product you will need. it keeps the product fresh and it is portable so you can take on the go. The consistency is gel-like but as soon as you massage it onto the skin, it melts and becomes a light water cream but not runny. It is easy to apply and it dries fairly quickly. It goes on clear and it does not irritate the skin. It has a nice cooling effect. It leaves the skin very smooth and soft. Likes: Natural ingredients It contains Manuka honey. I am aware of the many benefits of it which is the main reason I got this toner. I have not seen long term or visible changes in my skin yet but I'll keep you updated. The cooling effect Anti-bacterial and anti-inflammatory properties It is not greasy, oily or sticky. It does feel a bit tacky while it is drying but once it dries it is no longer tacky. Light texture A provides some hydration. It is not amazing but I am glad that it does not over dry my skin. It does not irritate my skin or cause redness It has cause me to break out It does not leave my skin looking extra oily Cruelty free Recycle packaging Dislikes: It does not dry out my skin but there had been occasion when I feel that this toner makes my skin feel tight and not very supple. I think that it is the tightening of the pores but when my skin is feeling dry. I rather use a more moisturizing toner. I read the ingredients lists and it lists "Parfum (fragrance)*" which is never good for me. I have had bad reactions to added fragrances in the past. This has not irritated my skin but I wish that they did not added it. The fragrance is from natural essential oils but I wish I knew which ones. I can never be extra careful. Overall Assessment: * Price Point: 4/5 * Quality/Durability: 5/5 * Need: 4/5 * Recommendation: 4/5 * Overall Assessment of Product: It has some great ingredients and the texture is unique. I love the refreshing and cooling effect and how it makes my skin feel smooth. I only wish that it was little bit more hydrating. For now, I will continue to use it and I will update this review with new information. I am not in love with it yet so we'll see. ****FTC - I received a discount for this product in exchanged for my honest and unbiased review. review_text: I was interested in trying this night cream because it claims to be especially formulated for oily to normal skin. PACKAGING: The night cream comes in a squeezable tube. I am not a big fan of this type of packaging because as you continue to use it, it becomes harder to get the product out and it can be wasteful. However, this type of packaging is great for traveling. Also, while I am not super impressed with the packaging, it does a nice job at keeping the product fresh. FIRST IMPRESSION: It has a light to medium consistency. It has a yellowish color but it does not stain your skin. It has a light scent and it is creamy. It is easy to distribute and apply. It does not irritate or cause redness. While you apply it it has a almost glossy finish and the skin feels soft but as it dries the skin looks matte and it feels smooth. There is no visible residue. PERFORMANCE: After I used it the first time I thought, "Actually this is nice, I think I will really like it", but after using it a few more times, I have changed my opinion. It has great benefits and it excels in some areas but in others I am not very impress with it. I am impress with the quality and its natural ingredients. It feels really nice when you put it on and the scent is not overbearing which is great. It has no parabens or dangerous chemicals. It is cruelty-free. It does not irritate my skin and it does not cause breakouts. It dries very fast which is great for those long days when I can wait to long to go to bed. It does not have a sticky or greasy finish. I have been using two different serums and they do not seen to get alone with this cream. So I change it to another and the same problem occur. After my serum is absorb into my skin, I apply this cream but it does not go on smoothly. It looks like brush strokes and it is very patchy. At first, I thought that I was applying to much but the results were the same with less product. This is not a big deal since it will dry either way. But it bother me for some reason. I enjoy how soft and supple my skin feels as soon as I apply it but then it losses that quality and becomes very matte and it is not longer super soft. My face feels a bit stiff. I would not mind much since it might be helping my skin stay firm. Buw when I wake up in the morning my skin does not feel very moisturize which I do not like. Every time I use it, I want to add a sleeping pack on top for moisture. However, I have to mentioned that while my skin does not feel supple and hydrated in the morning, it is not greasy or oily either. I am not saying the it will remove all of your sebum/oil but it just makes your skin look matte. I give it points for that but honestly, I rather give my skin hydration at night and I do not care much about looking oily. review_text: If you've been reading my blog, GlamRiver over the last few weeks then you already know that I've been testing out a skincare line by Natural Beauty Limited and it's no secret that I've been loving all the products. The latest one and sadly my last....for now....is this Manuka Honey & Manuka Oil Night Cream. I've been testing out a few heavy night oils over the last couple weeks so I decided to just use this Night Cream on my decollete so I could get a good feel for what I liked about it without it being overrun by other products. As I expected this is another gem of a product! While the consistency is a bit thicker than the Day Cream, as it should be, it still absorbs nicely and leaves skin feeling really well hydrated and nourished. I've been applying this at night right before bed and in the mornings I notice how soft, smooth and maybe even a little more plump my skin looks and feels. This product contains the Manuka Honey & Manuka Oil which help fight the micro-organisms that cause irritation, help stimulate cell renewal while hydrating and leave skin looking and feeling revitalized. So, once again, I am a big fan of all things Natural Beauty Limited. They have some truly exceptional products that are definitely worth checking out!

product_title: INCOK Tongue Cleaner | Scraper | Fresher Breath | Taste Enhancer | Surgical Grade Austenitic Steel (Saville Row)
product_description: The smooth and clean geometric lines of Amazing Grace evoke the approach of the avante-garde Abstract Art movement. Effortless style - much the same as the Amano experience. An amazing and graceful way to start the day. Why use a tongue cleanser? Our tongues are almost a third of the surface area of our mouth. They are a rich surface of papillae that has been likened to a deep-pile carpet. That makes them an excellent trap for decaying food debris and bacteria. Medical evidence shows that this environment can create bad breath, plaque and dental decay, as well as reduce taste sensitivity. Toothbrushes and mouthwashes simply cannot remove bacteria as effectively or safely as tongue cleansers. Using a tongue cleaner will: - reduce bad breath - reduce plaque formation - reduce tooth decay - refresh the palate, enabling taste buds to function more effectively Why Amano? The Italian-crafted Amano Tongue Cleanser has been designed to give a superior tongue cleansing performance. The head is made of 18/10 Austenitic Steel a high-grade chromium and nickel alloy. Because of the precise design and weight, there is NO GAG affect! And unlike a plastic tongue cleanser, which needs to be regularly replaced, an Amano Tongue Cleanser will last for years to come.

review_summary: Works for Eye Puffiness & Amazing Off-Label Headache Relief!!
review_text: This eye cream was far different than I was expecting -- but in a GREAT way. I'm 29-years-old, so the lines around my eyes aren't terribly deep, although they are probably deeper than many other females my age due to my sun-worshiping in earlier years. I do suffer, however, from severe seasonal allergies and am constantly plagued with dark circles ("allergic shiners" as they call them) and extreme puffiness of both my upper eyelids and just under my eyes (the infamous "bags"). To be honest, my impression of this cream at first glance wasn't too great. For starters, the jar of cream was much smaller than I had imagined, but I guess that's my fault for not noticing the (very) small-printed "0.5 fl oz" on the label in the picture. (I do think that this was a little deceitful though, because the size/amount of this cream is not listed anywhere on the product description.) In addition, while trying to read the teeny tiny print on the jar, I also almost immediately noticed a spelling typo on the front of the label that reads "Nautral & Healthy" rather than "Natural & Healthy." I know this seems like a rather minuscule and knit-picky detail to point out, but it did make me at least wonder about this company's quality control standards. Despite my initial impression, I gave the company/cream the benefit of the doubt and have been using it for the last few days. With my first application under my eyes, the cream felt more on the "thin" side (similar to a lotion rather than thick cream), but while rubbing the cream into my skin in a circular motion, the moisture that the cream delivered was far better than I anticipated. It takes at least 3-4 minutes before your skin feels like the cream is completely absorbed, which gave me ample time to slowly massage the area during absorption (and felt very soothing and relaxing). I had absolutely no issues with any side effects or skin reactions such as burning, tingling, redness, or irritation. I noticed a small "immediate" reduction in the pores and fine lines of the areas I applied the cream, though not as impressive as some of the Retinol and Vitamin C serums that I've used in the past. There was no obvious difference in the dark circles or puffiness right after application, however, within about 30-45min, the puffiness started to visibly decrease and the area all around my eyes felt less tender/achy in general. With each subsequent application, I noticed the same resulting decrease in puffiness as was observed initially. My puffiness did return each morning, but I expected because I'm still constantly being exposed to my allergens. (After all, the cream is meant to relieve a symptom of my allergies, not be a miracle cure for my chronic systemic condition.) I've noticed that if I apply the cream immediately before bed and spend more time rubbing it into my skin in the circular motions, I do have a noticeable decrease in the morning when I wake up compared to before I started using the cream. As far as the under-eye dark circles, I can't tell a difference so far - but in all fairness, I've only been using the cream for 4 days (twice daily) so there's still hope. Now for the best part (in my opinion, at least). On the second night of using this cream, I had yet another one of my throbbing headaches (allergies are the worst!!) About 15-20min after my evening cream application, I noticed that my headache felt a little better -- I'm not saying that there was some miraculous change here, but it did feel less severe. This was very unusual for me, as I hadn't taken any ibuprofen or Zyrtec at that point (my usual go-to medications when my headaches are severe). The only thing I could think that I had done differently this time than any other time was that I applied the cream -- it was a strange connection, but stranger things have certainly happened to me. I went back to look at the ingredients listed on the jar and saw that it had rooibos in it. I had absolutely no idea what this was (and probably didn't notice it the first time I looked because I don't have a magnifying glass), but I looked it up online and read that it's an herb from South Africa with a laundry-list of health benefits -- including antioxidant properties and... headache relief?!?! Although still relatively skeptical that this was just a coincidence and that I had gotten "lucky" on my google search, I was still optimistic and proceeded to rub the eye cream on my temples and at the base of my skull to see what would happen. After a good 30-45min, my headache was almost completely gone. I know this headache thing sounds ridiculous and obscure, but I encourage anyone to research this mysterious Rooibos for themselves. I haven't had a headache as severe as that one since, but I have had a few headaches start to come on, and with each headache, I applied the cream to my temples, under my eyes, and to the base of my skull and the feeling has gone away each time within about an hour. With all of this said, I couldn't rate this "eye" cream turned headache remedy anything less than 5 stars despite my initial less-than-thrilled first impression. Because the cream is light and only requires a very small amount with each application, I think the small jar will actually last me a reasonably long time, too. Between the headache relief and the disappearing eye bags, I would be confident in recommending this product to others. I was also fortunate to receive my first jar of this cream at a discounted price or free in exchange for my honest and unbiased review.

review_summary: Astonishingly Beautiful Matte Colors that have Wonderfully Pigmented, Vibrant, and an Abundance of Depth!
review_text: I purchased this set of Bonita Velvet Lip Cream Set for myself. I prefer Lip Creams or Lip Stains over traditional Lipsticks and Lip Glosses. I also love Colors that are well Pigmented and Matte. This set was Spot On Colors, they were Beautiful with Serious Depth. The Matte was Superior one of the Best Appearing Matte Sets I've seen to date. I did not give this item five stars because, when I wore them they felt more like a Gloss than a Cream Lipstick or Lip Color. I was expecting a different type of product, and this may just be me as I am Notoriously Picky about My Lip Products. Please don't think this is a understand this product was or is Fantastic, The Colors and Matte are Astonishingly Beautiful, the error was most likely mine. On the Positive Side my neighbor Lives for Lip Gloss so naturally I gifted them to her. She has never been so delighted, and is totally Digging On This Set Of Lip Creams. She thinks it is all in my head because as she told me, This Lip Cream is Silky Feeling on my Lips! What can I say? I was given a discount in exchange for my Honest, Fair, and Unbiased Review. My Reviews are Sincere and Genuine regardless of any discount given or not given. I Heavily Rely On and Depend On Reviews Prior To Making My Own Purchases. I hope this review was of some assistance to you. Bonita Velvet Lip Cream Set 5-Piece Collection

review_summary: These lip colors look very pretty while wearing
review_text: These lip colors look very pretty while wearing. They do need touch up through the day and you have to be careful when applying to make sure you don't layer it too thick. As far as the "matte" description I would say not quite. They have a cream finish that still looks great but they never really dried all the way to a matte finish for me. I would also suggest wearing a complimenting lip liner to keep the color where you want it. But with the color selection I am still very pleased. I received these lip colors at a promotional rate in exchange for testing purposes and an honest review.

product_title: AORAEM Eyelash Lash Eyelashes Wave Curling Perming Curler Rod Glue Perm Kit Sets
product_description:
Please refer to the instrument as below:
1. Thoroughly cleanse eyelashes.
2. Choose a proper roller based on the actual length of your eyelashes.
3. Apply a thin layer of glue over your eyelashes.
4. Wait a few seconds till the eyelashes become partially dry, stick the roller to the eyelashes.
5. Apply another layer of glue onto the roller and wait another few seconds ( partially dry as well), use a toothpick carefully to turn the eyelashes onto the roller one by one
6. Dip the pink lotion with a cosmetic tip and then apply it onto the roller, wait for 10-25 minutes (thin eyelashes: 10-15minnutes, average: 20 minutes, thick eyelashes: 25 minutes) before wiping out.
7. Dip the colour Blue lotion with a cosmetic tip and then apply it onto the roller, wait for 10-25 minutes (thin eyelashes: 10-15minnutes, average: 15-18 20 minutes, thick eyelashes: 18-20 minutes) before wiping out.
8. Dip the yellow colour liquid with a cosmetic tip and then apply it onto the roller for about three minutes before wiping out.
9. Dip the Clear liquid with a cosmetic tip to clean the excess glue on the roller. Finally, you have lovely and beautiful eyelashes.
Dos and don'ts:
1. Never put this item into the refrigerator, only leave it in the shady and dry place.
2. Never use the same cosmetic tips to dip different lotion or liquid.
3. Never use metallic tips to dip lotion or liquid especially the pink one.

review_summary: My eye is swollen and scabed with stiff eyelashes
review_text: I got this and I used it the weekend I got it and when I was done with the process and everything my eyelashes were so straight up, it wasn't a natural curl it was a straight up "curl" I didn't like it AT ALL and it's permanent for 3 months or so, so I wasn't satisfied and I was wearing my glasses everywhere I went so it'd be less noticeable and my family and friends said I looked like a different person bc my natural eyelashes are completely straight and it was different to look at. Then the next day after I permed my lashes my eyelid was swollen, i don't really know exactly what happened like if I got some solution in my eye or the solution got on my eyelid I have no idea, then the couple of days my eyelid scabed up and that's where I am today, with a scabed eyelid and my friends at school are asking me all this questions about my eyelashes and my eyelid. But overall if you want to get this go right ahead but if your nervous about the result, don't do it it's PERMANENT for up to 3 months and if your not satisfied there's nothing you can do but wait it out until they go down on there own, trust me I've already tried to push them down, trying something so it'd go back to the way it was, nothing worked.

review_summary: Video Demonstration of Face and Feet Attachments
review_text: CORRECTION: Even though I fully submerged this product in water on video with no damage, it is not meant to be fully submerged in water; only the head is "waterproof." Getting the battery box wet can apparently result in damage to the product, according to the manufacturer. REVIEW: I have always wanted one of these electronic cleansing brushes. This is the first and only one I've tried, and my skin has never felt so clean and looked so bright (the video shows in the end). Kind of a thrill. The cordless machine is easy to use; the brushes are soft and feel fantastic on the face. It would be nice to have more power and speed essential for buffing feet (so I had to remove a star), but even the single speed of this machine makes it an invigorating cleanser for face and body. Using it is also relaxing, like giving myself a spa day. The machine fits easily in the hand, has a waterproof head, and is simple to operate (just an on/off button). It takes four AA batteries, and here's a tip: to open the battery chamber, don't try to click the "push" button shown on the handle; instead just grab the whole bottom of the gadget with one hand and pull it off. The product comes with four attachments. On the video, I demonstrate the small brush for cleansing my face and the small sponge for the facial scrub and dissolving the facial mask. I used the pumice attachment for the feet. The large brush is supposed to be a body brush, which I didn't demonstrate but feels great. The sponge attachment can also be used with moisturizer for a face massage. Overall, I am keeping this cleansing brush in the shower for daily use. A sample of this product was provided for honest review, and I honestly love it. Also, it has a 1-month free trial period and a 2-year warranty.

review_summary: Nice Facial Cleaning Brush Offers Four Diverse Brush Heads but Only One Speed Option
review_text: I'm very interested in trying new beauty products to pamper myself, and I have some dry skin on my face that I'm always struggling to keep in check, so it sounded appealing to give this waterproof facial brush cleaning system a try to compare and contrast to other similar products I own. This skin cleansing kit comes with one waterproof and cordless rotating machine, one facial brush, one large body brush, one serum and moisturizer applicator sponge, and one pumice stone. This machine requires four AA batteries to run, which aren't included. The brushes feel pleasant to the touch, and I liked that four different attachment heads were included. They are soft, but have just enough pressure to them to feel like they will exfoliate dirt, oil, and dead skin well. The set-up for this cleaning system is simple and straightforward, but I found it quite difficult to open the battery compartment on the end of the handle. Once the batteries were inserted successfully and the battery compartment was snapped back into place, all that I needed to do was to pick a brush head and push it in to the attachment point. Then you can turn the unit on or off by pressing one of two buttons on the blue section of the brush. In my experience with the brushes, they didn't rotate evenly, and the brushes wobbled as they rotated. I'm not sure if this is an intended feature or not, but I'm suspecting it simply means the platforms for the brushes aren't quite even. I'm glad that this cleaning system is waterproof, but I'll admit I was a bit underwhelmed that it only has one speed, and that that speed is rather slow. I still feel like I will get some good use out of it, but I would have liked if there were more speed options, because for attachments like the pumice stone, you really need a slightly faster speed for it to perform really well. That said, I was generally pleased with the accessories offered in the kit, but would have liked if they included a small storage or travel bag of some kind. Overall, I like this waterproof electric facial brush, and would recommend it if you're considering adding one to your own health and beauty routine. Just keep in mind it has only one slow speed, and that you will need to provide your own storage bag and batteries. I am a longtime Amazon Prime customer who writes reviews in my free time. I was appreciative to be given an opportunity to test and review this waterproof facial brush cleaning brush complimentary for my honest and unbiased review. If you have any questions or comments about this product or my review, feel free to message me and I'll be glad to help!

review_summary: 20+ year old scars are going away...

I apply that first, then my regular moisturizer and sometimes even makeup if Im going out. I have tried numerous other products and never gotten results like this.

review_text: This is a nice lipgloss. The color i go is Pinking of You and i thought it would be darker than it is, even for a gloss its a bit light. It actually looks like i have a slight clear sheen on my lips instead of color. Not that its terrible at all, you can also wear it over lipstick to make it have a bit of a shine and the color of the gloss will not affect the lipstick color. This causes no irritation and smells quite good, like vanilla cupcakes. It went on easily and i like the smaller applicator because my lips are small so i don't over fill and smear. I did have to apply it frequestly after each drink or food, it does come off easily, its not sticky or tacky either. Its a good gloss and the size is nice for how much you need to use (which is not a lot) so i am happy with this. Note - I have received this item in exchange for an honest review.

review_text: I'm super impressed with this cream. First of all, I really like the jar that this comes in as the lid is easy to screw off and it makes application super simple, much better than a pump-based bottle. Upon applying this to my face for several days in a row now, I'm to the point where I don't leave home without it. Although it's a "substantial" cream in that it's kind of thick, it actually absorbs into the face very easily. It also tingles a bit which is a nice touch, makes me feel like it's really doing something. Overall this product was nicely packaged and works great thus far! I highly recommend even though I did receive a discount on the purchase.

review_text: I love this sunscreen. I am a naturally fair-skinned, blue-eyed blonde, meaning I burn easily. I have tried MANY different brands of sunscreen over the years and yes they work but they are usually too greasy, or smelly, or leave a white film, cause break outs, etc. This Biore' product is the lightest, non-greasy formula I have ever found, and it WORKS, even when I spend a day on a boat and hanging out on a sandbar. I can go several hours before reapplying. Because I had a basal cell carcinoma a few years back I am particular about reapplying sunscreen every 4 hours or so, but there have been days when I forgot and this product still protected me from burning. It takes a few weeks to get this after ordering because it ships from Japan, I just wish there was a distributor in the U.S., so plan ahead if you are running low on product.

For my review: it literally feels like water when you apply it. I can't feel it at all after I applied it to my skin. It dries beautifully, leaves no white cast. review_text: This is the most amazing sunscreen I've ever used. I hate sunscreen. It usually causes my skin to flush and makes me sweat at first, the I'm left feeling greasy and uncomfortable. I wash it off as soon as I can. I bought Biore UV Aqua Rich after watching YouTube reviews and it is amazing. First, it doesn't have that awful sunscreen smell at all. It's a thin formula and has a slightly astringent feel. When you first put it on you need to give it a moment to settle in, but once it does, you skin is left feeling as if there's nothing on your face. I wore it during a day at an amusement park and didn't get burned at all. It's amazing and I have been recommending it to everyone.

product_title: Black Mask Blackhead Remover Mask Purifing Charcoal Peel Off Mask-Bamboo Activated Charcoal Face Mask Deep Pore Cleansing Black Facial Mask for Face Nose and Acne Treatment 100g
product_description:
About the blackhead remover mask:
This coveted black mask is formulated by natural ingredients such as bamboo charcoal, chamomile, green tea, and centella asiatica combing the power of nature with advanced technology to deeply clean the skin. Extracted from natural bamboo ash, the activated charcoal has been prized for its powerful absorption abilities. It acts like a magnet to draw out dirt, debris and impurities. Leaves skin feeling refreshed, youthful and silky-smooth to the touch. Try this extraordinary skin-care experience right now!

How to Use:
1. Rinse your face with warm water and hot pack your face for 3-5 min with towel to open pores.
2. Apply few black mask on wrist to do an allergy test.
3. Spread blackhead mask on desired parts with brush and wait for 15-20 minutes (avoid the eyes, eyebrows and lip areas).
4. Gently peel it off then rinse with warm water and continue your skin care routine.

Warm Prompt:
1. Rub a small amount of mask on the inside of your elbow area to test for any allergic reaction before using.
2. Stop using if discomfort or irritation occurs.
3. Avoid contacting with eyes and keep out of the children's reach.
4. DO NOT use blackhead mask on the areas with injuries, burns, eczema, or dermatitis.
5. For better peel off result, we suggest you to apply thin layer black mask(around 1 mm).
6. If the mask can not pull out of the tube, you can dip it into a warm water and it can be easy to pull out. The reason is that the mask might be storage in the wrong place during the transport or in the amazon warehouse.

Package Including
1Blackhead Mask
1Facial Brush
1Usage manual

WARRANTY
If you are not satisfied with the blackhead remover mask, we offer a full 100% REFUND. There is literally no risk for you, so don't hesitate to try our peel off mask.

review_summary: Great way to treat your lips to a little massage
review_text: I have nice full lips (and in case you think I'm being vain, believe me, my lips are pretty much my only good feature) and they seem to be the part of my face that I mostly ignore. Sure, I'll throw on some natural lip balm or lip gloss when I remember, but while I exfoliate my face and make sure to always moisturize my eye area, the lips remain neglected. But now I have a way to give them a nice massage and exfoliate my lips too! You only need a small bit of scrub to cover your entire lip area, so don't get overly enthusiastic when you open up the nice size tub of scrub. Simply rub the scrub gently onto your lips and feel the circulation return to this neglected area. You can either rinse with water, or I prefer to use a wet washcloth for more control. Afterwards, my lips look slightly plumped due to the increased circulation and are smooth and ready for my lip balm/gloss. Overall, I can recommend this product to others. I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest review.

review_text: I used the exfoliating lip polish as directed several nights in a row before going to bed. The first night I put it on my lips and rubbed it as the directions stated, but I think I may have rubbed a little too hard because my lips hurt from the exfoliation. I have noticed the Lip Scrub does help a little better than the Chap Stick by exfoliating the lips a little. I ordered the strawberry and it smells really good too, which is a plus. Extracted from natural bamboo ash, the activated charcoal has been prized for its powerful absorption abilities. It acts like a magnet to draw out dirt, debris and impurities. Leaves skin feeling refreshed, youthful and silky-smooth to the touch. Try this extraordinary skin-care experience right now!

How to Use:
1. Rinse your face with warm water and hot pack your face for 3-5 min with towel to open pores.
2. Apply few black mask on wrist to do an allergy test.
3. Spread blackhead mask on desired parts with brush and wait for 15-20 minutes (avoid the eyes, eyebrows and lip areas).
4. Gently peel it off then rinse with warm water and continue your skin care routine.

Warm Prompt:
1. Rub a small amount of mask on the inside of your elbow area to test for any allergic reaction before using.
2. Stop using if discomfort or irritation occurs.
3. Avoid contacting with eyes and keep out of the children's reach.
4. DO NOT use blackhead mask on the areas with injuries, burns, eczema, or dermatitis.
5. For better peel off result, we suggest you to apply thin layer black mask(around 1 mm).
6. If the mask can not pull out of the tube, you can dip it into a warm water and it can be easy to pull out. The reason is that the mask might be storage in the wrong place during the transport or in the amazon warehouse.

review_summary: Keeps Lips Moist. Blot Away Salt Scrub From Lips Afterward.
review_text: This lip scrub was interesting for me to use. I found that when I wiped it on and then rinsed it off with water while rubbing my lips, it made my lips feel more hydrated and not as dry. I feel like this lip scrub is similar to the body scrubs that have oils and salts or sugars. The ingredients listed on the bottle for those who will want to know is: pure organic cane sugar, organic avocado oil, organic shea butter, organic jojoba oil, organic argan oil, organic palm fruit oil, organic coconut oil, organic olive oil, olive squalone, vitamin e, organic elderberry fruit extract, flavor, mica minerals. I liked the refreshing mint "flavor" and saw that some of the other "flavors" were even more interesting and unique. My lips tend to get chapped a lot and I think that this product does help to keep my lips moist. However, I would make sure to have a bathroom sink handy, or maybe something with which to dab at your lips, while using this product. I received this product for free in exchange for my honest and unbiased review.

review_text: I rarely buy face creams because I can always find faults with them. Either they don't give me any noticeable benefits or they have potentially toxic ingredients. It is well known that majority of creams produced by large manufacturers cost less than containers they are in. I often mixed my own skin remedies. So, all that being said, I was pleasantly surprised with gentle but efficient night cream. My skin was irritated, tired as I was coming down with a cold. Usually your face does not recover until your whole body is better. But the cream made my skin look very healthy by the morning. It was soothing to irritated skin when I put it on first. It easily absorbs in spite of its rich texture. It smells very pleasantly, not overwhelming, just good. I am 46, have mixed/ combination skin and never use any big commercial brand products. I am very happy with the cream. My advice is not to use it continuously for longer than a week, then your skin will not have a chance to get bored with it. (Yes, the skin gets bored even with the best food you give her) And you will see great effect as soon as you start it again!

review_text: In the space of a couple years, I moved from the Nevada desert to the tropics of Hawaii, to the tundra of Alaska. This has wrecked havoc on my skin. I went from dry to oily to combination skin. Ive gone to the dermatologist, who put me on a regimen that has now made my skin the driest its ever been. I don't appreciate my skin peeling every afternoon, and Im also tired of putting harsh chemicals on my skin. I recently made to switch to all-natural makeup, and Ive been looking for a brand to switch to all natural skin care. Hence, I was excited when I got to try out the Living Nature line at a discount. The first thing that attracted me to this product is the fact that its made in New Zealand. I had the pleasure of visiting N Zed a couple years ago, and it was refreshing to see the high standards that the country has on organics the lack of pesticides, hormones and additives seen in meat, and how much fresher and better everything there smelled and tasted. Having been there, I automatically trust the products produced there more than I would anywhere else. As far as this natural night cream goes, Ive been using it every night, in conjunction with the rest of the line of Living Nature products, and I am very happy with the results. I have been using products with hyaluronic acid for years, and sometimes you can tell a difference and sometimes you can't. I can definitely tell the difference in my skin with this cream. The cream goes on smoothly, and I can see/feel my skin getting firmer already. My skin is no longer peeling every afternoon, and not only is it a lot clearer/more even in tone, but its also a lot firmer and youthful looking. I can now see that the chemical products I was using were making my skin worse, not better. I also have to mention that I really love the natural smell that the products in this line have. It reminds of hiking through Karangahake Gorge and all the plant life you could smell whilst walking next to the raging river: damp, tropical, fresh, exotic. It looks like Ive found the brand to finally make the switch to all natural face products. Highly recommend!

review_summary: Good Overall, but feels and smells like glue
review_text: Smells and feels like Elmer's school glue. However, it's not a bad product. For the price it's more than I expected. It goes across the skin fairly easily, even though if you're not careful it will drip a bit. It peels off nicely and my skin always feels tight, refreshed, and soft after application. Definitely not the quality you'd expect from a brand name product, but for four bucks off amazon it's a great value. As it dries it begins to form little bubbles, but it's not huge. You can see what that looks like in my last pic. It is a little drying, so I only regularly apply it (about once a week) to problem areas; my nose, forehead, and chin. Overall I recommend this product!

product_title: Amalia Antioxidant Milk
product_description: Amalia Antioxidant Milk is the ultimate complexion perfecting elixir that rejuvenates skin texture and evens tone, by micro-peeling and supporting cell turnover. Our refining formula visibly brightens, reduces sun and age spots, tightens pores and diminishes the appearance of the fine lines. Skin regenerating actives gently resurface dry, dull skin while nurturing new healthy skin. The results reveal a smoother, clearer, and younger look and feel. KEY INGREDIENTS: VITAMIN E: Combats the aging process by blocking free radicals and promotes youthful-looking skin by repairing and strengthening tissue. Contains powerful anti-inflammatory properties, which prevent the signs of premature aging. Inflammatory conditions in the skin are a leading cause of skin aging. GLYCOLIC ACID: Derived from cane sugar, it provides a remarkably even exfoliation of the skin, recognizing and dissolving dead skin cells. Minimizes the appearance of pores and stimulates the rebuilding of skin cells, resulting in a brighter and more even complexion. JOJOBA OIL: Non-greasy and natural antiseptic. Anti-bacterial and anti-inflammatory ingredient that prevents acne. Jojoba oil is very similar to the natural oils that our bodies produce on a regular basis, making it a highly effective all natural moisturizer. PEPTIDES: Powerful stimulants that encourage skin to rebuild collagen, helping prevent the visible effects of collagen loss and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. FREE FROM: Parabens, sulfates and phthalates VEGAN AND CRUELTY FREE

review_text: This is the second cream I bought through this line.. The other was a cellular regenerating cream which was the cream that made be a believer in this skincare line. After already using their other cream to hydrate and get control of my skin - which was overproducing oil due to improper moisturizing coupled with exposing my skin to the extreme conditions Florida has to offer, I decided to try this to get the actual appearance of my face under control. I'm 34 and my 30s aren't kind to me at all. Stress, high UV rays, salty Gulf of Mexico, age...They all did a number on my appearance. Pores are enlarged, wrinkles are trying to find a permanent home on my face and I can't even describe how terrible it is to physically SEE yourself age. By the time you notice it, you're in a desperate hurry to reverse it! So I tried this to help the superficial issues I have.. Some scarring, enlarged pores, just all around my skin just looks like it's been abused haha. So this stuff right here is cool, it truly does erase stuff! Pores shrink - even after the first use and your entire face just sort of looks like you had a mini microdermabrasion during your lunch hour. Brighter, tighter appearance.. Literally, it erases the dull, tired look and leaves you with a slight glow, the one that comes with healthy skin. Honestly, these are the kind of things women are in a race to find once you hit a certain age or after the elements have done its number on you. So this cream comes in a small jar but the amount inside the jar is almost too generous for the amount you actually need. A little goes a long way with this. It absorbs nicely but requires some massage during application but by no means is it difficult to rub in. It has a very light feel to it and it doesn't really feel like you're wearing it after its absorbed. I use other products from this line so as much as I want to say that this alone is responsible for the magic, I can't. But I can say that I have seen even more of an improvement with this product added to my beauty routine which consists of 2 other products made by Amelie. I'm continuously impressed with their products and want to own and use everything by them because I've seen such drastic improvements to the appearance of my skin since I started using them. The results are instant and long lasting. I highly recommend this skincare line.. This particular product as well as the others. One of most wonderful feelings is being asked by the people you see often what I'm doing different or if I got a facial. This tells me that my skin improvement is drastic enough to be noticed and radiant enough to be complimented. The exciting part is finding such a good product that produces the result it promises. The rewarding part is being able to give the name of the products im using to people who are also seeking the same results that they see I've gotten. I'm always asked and I always respond with this line. I'm leaving this review open on my browser so I can come back and attach photos and will continuously 'update' under this comment every month or so to give more detailed results.

review_text: I have been using this twice a day, once in the morning and at night and I love it. I am only in my thirties, but my skin gets beat up pretty bad a work and is starting to show it. So far this has helped my skin look healthier. It makes my skin feel so smooth, soft, hydrated, and healthy. My skin is semi oily, but it does not get oily or greasy like with other products I have tried. This is important to me because I still get breakouts. I love all the natural ingredients in it. It is semi-thick, but absorbs into my skin quickly. There is a light scent, but is not overwhelming and does not stay with you after it dries. I did not have any redness or irritation while using this or afterwards. A small amount of this goes a long way so the jar has lasted a long time. This will be great in the winter time as well when my skin really dries out. I love that this is cruelty free. I would recommend this to anyone. review_text: I was so excited to try out this cream! I was looking for the perfect moisturizer than I can use every morning before I apply makeup. I have been using this cream every morning before I apply my daily makeup. This cream did not have any negative effects on my makeup application. I actually feel like this cream helped my makeup adhere to my skin and last longer than it has in the past! This cream is very easy to apply and absorbs quickly into my skin. The cream itself does feel very luxurious. It doesn't leave my skin feeling greasy, which is super important to me. I have been using this smoothing treatment cream on both my face and neck. It's important to take care of your neck as you do your face. This Amelie Skincare facial moisturizer also has a light and pleasant scent. It's definitely been a treat to use this on my skin! After using this cream for about a week, I have noticed results. My skin looks smoother already and my fine lines are diminishing. My skin also always feels hydrated and moisturized for the whole day, when I only apply it in the morning! I feel like this is the one cream I need in my morning routine. It really is effective! It has not caused any acne or caused a negative reaction with my sensitive skin. I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest and unbiased review.

review_text: For a year I have been battling a severe case of planters warts---I underwent surgery, daily acid treatments, and shaving off of the warts. The good news, I finally was able to rid myself of these warts, but, both feet, were a mess of raw and peeling skin. By chance, during a massage at my health club, the attendant noticed the condition of my feet and recommended this product. She applied it at that session and wrapped by feet in warm towels--it felt so good I ordered the product and applied it to my feet each night. After about a month of these nightly applications both feet are not only fully healed, but, the normal callouses I had due to running have been softened. I should add, that I feel we often ignore the condition of our feet...but, after this year, I would recommend some form of daily attention to feet care.
